    52→
    53→def _is_non_rd_title(title: str) -> bool:
    54→    """Check if a title indicates a non-R&D role.
    55→
    56→    Strict mode: if any non-R&D keyword appears, filter out regardless of
    57→    whether R&D keywords are also present (e.g. "技术产品经理" is filtered).
    58→    Returns False (keep) only if title is empty or contains no non-R&D keywords.
    59→    """
    60→    if not title:
    61→        return False
    62→
    63→    # Strict: any non-R&D keyword present → filter out
    64→    if any(kw in title for kw in NON_RD_KEYWORDS):
    65→        return True
    66→
    67→    return False
    68→
    69→
    70→@dataclass
    71→class CandidateBasic:
    72→    """Basic candidate information from search results."""
    73→    maimai_id: str
    74→    name: str
    75→    title: str
    76→    company: str
    77→    location: Optional[str] = None
    78→    profile_url: Optional[str] = None
    79→
    80→
    81→async def search_candidates(
    82→    keywords: str,
    83→    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
    84→    location: Optional[str] = None,
    85→    pages: int = 1,
    86→    start_page: int = 1,
    87→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None
    88→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
    89→    """
    90→    Search for candidates on Maimai.
    91→
    92→    Args:
    93→        keywords: Search keywords (e.g., "高级前端工程师")
    94→        company: Filter by company names, tuple of strings (optional)
    95→        location: Filter by location (optional)
    96→        pages: Number of pages to scrape (default 1)
    97→        start_page: First page number to scrape (default 1)
    98→        browser: Browser manager instance
    99→
   100→    Returns:
   101→        List of CandidateBasic objects
   102→
   103→    Raises:
   104→        RateLimitExceededError: If rate limit exceeded
   105→        SelectorNotFoundError: If page elements not found
   106→    """
   107→    # Validate inputs
   108→    validate_keywords(keywords)
   109→
   110→    if browser is None:
   111→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   112→
   113→    config = get_config()
   114→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   115→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   116→
   117→    # Ensure logged in
   118→    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   119→
   120→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   121→
   122→    with Progress(
   123→        SpinnerColumn(),
   124→        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
   125→        console=console
   126→    ) as progress:
   127→
   128→        end_page = start_page + pages
   129→        for page_num in range(start_page, end_page):
   130→            task = progress.add_task(f"Searching page {page_num}/{end_page - 1}...", total=None)
   131→
   132→            try:
   133→                # Check rate limit (waits through min-interval)
   134→                await async_check_rate_limit('search')
   135→
   136→                # Build search URL
   137→                params = {
   138→                    'type': 'contact',
   139→                    'query': keywords,
   140→                    'highlight': 'true'
   141→                }
   142→                if page_num > 1:
   143→                    params['page'] = str(page_num)
   144→
   145→                search_url = f"{MAIMAI_SEARCH_URL}?{urlencode(params)}"
   146→
   147→                page = browser.page
   148→
   149→                # Navigate to search page
   150→                await retry_navigation(page, search_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   151→
   152→                # Wait for page load
   153→                await async_random_delay('page_load')
   154→
   155→                # Check for captcha
   156→                await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   157→
   158→                # Click "人脉" tab to show contact results
   159→                try:
   160→                    renmai_tab = await page.query_selector('text="人脉"')
   161→                    if renmai_tab:
   162→                        await renmai_tab.click()
   163→                        logger.info("Clicked '人脉' tab")
   164→                        await async_random_delay('action')
   165→                        # Wait for content to load
   166→                        await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   167→                except Exception as e:
   168→                    logger.debug(f"Could not click 人脉 tab: {e}")
   169→
   170→                # Simulate human behavior
   171→                await human_scroll(page, 'down', distance=300)
   172→                await async_random_delay('action')
   173→
   174→                # Extract candidates from this page
   175→                candidates = await _extract_search_results(page, config)
   176→
   177→                if not candidates:
   178→                    logger.info(f"No results found on page {page_num}")
   179→                    await browser.screenshot(f"search_debug_page{page_num}")
   180→                    progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: No results")
   181→                    # Allow one empty page (could be transient), break on second consecutive
   182→                    if page_num > start_page and not all_candidates:
   183→                        # First page had no results either — genuinely empty
   184→                        break
   185→                    continue
   186→
   187→                # Filter out non-R&D roles
   188→                before_rd_filter = len(candidates)
   189→                candidates = [c for c in candidates if not _is_non_rd_title(c.title)]
   190→                rd_filtered = before_rd_filter - len(candidates)
   191→                if rd_filtered > 0:
   192→                    logger.info(f"Filtered out {rd_filtered} non-R&D candidates")
   193→
   194→                # Apply filters if specified
   195→                if company:
   196→                    company_lower = [cn.lower() for cn in company]
   197→                    candidates = [c for c in candidates if any(cn in c.company.lower() for cn in company_lower)]
   198→
   199→                if location:
   200→                    candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.location and location.lower() in c.location.lower()]
   201→
   202→                all_candidates.extend(candidates)
   203→                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Found {len(candidates)} candidates")
   204→
   205→                # Log the action
   206→                rate_limiter.log_action('search', {
   207→                    'keywords': keywords,
   208→                    'page': page_num,
   209→                    'results': len(candidates)
   210→                })
   211→
   212→                # Save candidates to database
   213→                _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates, keywords)
   214→
   215→                # Delay before next page
   216→                if page_num < end_page - 1:
   217→                    await async_random_delay('page_load')
   218→
   219→            except (BrowserError, SessionExpiredError):
   220→                raise  # Critical errors must propagate
   221→            except Exception as e:
   222→                logger.error(f"Error on page {page_num}: {e}")
   223→                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Error - {str(e)[:30]}")
   224→                # Take screenshot for debugging
   225→                await browser.screenshot(f"search_error_page{page_num}")
   226→                continue
   227→
   228→    # Log search to history
   229→    _log_search_history(db_manager, keywords, company, location, pages, len(all_candidates))
   230→
   231→    console.print(f"[green]Search complete. Found {len(all_candidates)} candidates.[/green]")
   232→    return all_candidates
   233→
   234→
   235→async def _extract_search_results(page: Page, config) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   236→    """
   237→    Extract candidate information from search results page.
   238→
   239→    Args:
   240→        page: Playwright page instance
   241→        config: Config instance
   242→
   243→    Returns:
   244→        List of CandidateBasic objects
   245→    """
   246→    candidates = []
   247→
   248→    try:
   249→        # Wait for page to be fully loaded
   250→        await page.wait_for_load_state('networkidle', timeout=10000)
   251→    except Exception:
   252→        pass  # Continue even if networkidle times out
   253→
   254→    # Wait for actual result cards to render (avoid "搜索数据中..." race condition)
   255→    try:
   256→        await page.wait_for_function(
   257→            '''() => {
   258→                const body = document.body ? document.body.innerText : '';
   259→                if (body.includes('搜索数据中') || body.includes('加载中')) return false;
   260→                // Check for avatar images indicating result cards are rendered
   261→                const imgs = document.querySelectorAll('img');
   262→                let avatarCount = 0;
   263→                for (const img of imgs) {
   264→                    const rect = img.getBoundingClientRect();
   265→                    if (rect.width >= 20 && rect.width <= 100 && rect.height >= 20 && rect.height <= 100) {
   266→                        avatarCount++;
   267→                    }
   268→                }
   269→                return avatarCount >= 1;
   270→            }''',
   271→            timeout=8000,
   272→        )
   273→    except Exception:
   274→        logger.debug("Timed out waiting for result cards to render, proceeding with extraction")
   275→
   276→    try:
   277→        # Strategy: Extract candidates by finding avatar images and their associated text
   278→        candidates_data = await page.evaluate('''() => {
   279→            const candidates = [];
   280→            const seenNames = new Set();
   281→
   282→            // Find all images that look like avatars
   283→            const images = document.querySelectorAll('img');
   284→
   285→            for (const img of images) {
   286→                // Skip large images (probably not avatars)
   287→                const rect = img.getBoundingClientRect();
   288→                if (rect.width > 100 || rect.height > 100) continue;
   289→                if (rect.width < 20 || rect.height < 20) continue;
   290→
   291→                // Find parent container (the card)
   292→                let card = img.parentElement;
   293→                for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
   294→                    const cardRect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
   295→                    // Look for a reasonable card size
   296→                    if (cardRect.width > 200 && cardRect.height > 50 && cardRect.height < 200) {
   297→                        break;
   298→                    }
   299→                    card = card.parentElement;
   300→                }
   301→
   302→                if (!card) continue;
   303→
   304→                // Get all text nodes from card, preserving order
   305→                const textParts = [];
   306→                const walker = document.createTreeWalker(card, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT, null, false);
   307→                while (walker.nextNode()) {
   308→                    const text = walker.currentNode.textContent.trim();
   309→                    if (text && text.length > 0 && text.length < 100) {
   310→                        textParts.push(text);
   311→                    }
   312→                }
   313→
   314→                // Parse candidate info from text parts
   315→                // Pattern: Name, Activity time, Company+Position, Industry|Department
   316→                let name = '';
   317→                let company = '';
   318→                let title = '';
   319→                let industry = '';
   320→
   321→                // Compound job title patterns (longer patterns first for greedy match)
   322→                const jobPatterns = [
   323→                    // Compound titles with prefix modifiers
   324→                    /(?:高级|资深|首席|初级|中级|senior|junior|staff|principal|lead)?\s*(?:前端|后端|全栈|web|Web|iOS|Android|Java|Python|Go|C\+\+|PHP|.NET|算法|数据|AI|机器学习|深度学习|NLP|大数据|云计算|DevOps|SRE|安全|测试|嵌入式|移动端|客户端|服务端|区块链|具身智能|自动驾驶|机器人)?\s*(?:工程师|开发|架构师|专家|技术经理|技术总监|技术负责人|Tech\s*Lead)/i,
   325→                    // Management titles
   326→                    /(?:技术|产品|运营|市场|销售|人力|财务|行政|项目|研发)?\s*(?:总监|经理|主管|负责人|VP|总裁|副总|合伙人|创始人|董事|CEO|CTO|COO|CFO|CMO|CHO|CIO)/i,
   327→                    // Other roles
   328→                    /(?:产品|UI|UX|交互|视觉)?\s*(?:设计师|分析师|顾问|运营|助理|实习生?)/i,
   329→                ];
   330→
   331→                // Patterns for text that should be skipped
   332→                const skipPatterns = [
   333→                    /^[+＋]\s*好友$/,          // "+ 好友" button
   334→                    /^\d+个共同好友$/,           // "1个共同好友" social label
   335→                    /^共同好友/,                 // "共同好友..." variants
   336→                    /^已关注$/,                  // "已关注" button
   337→                    /^添加好友$/,                // "添加好友" button
   338→                    /^关注$/,                    // "关注" button
   339→                    /^好友$/,                    // "好友" label
   340→                    /^[|｜·]$/,                  // separators
   341→                ];
   342→
   343→                const isSkippable = (text) => {
   344→                    if (skipPatterns.some(p => p.test(text))) return true;
   345→                    // Activity time
   346→                    if (/天前|小时前|分钟前|刚刚|活跃|在线/.test(text)) return true;
   347→                    return false;
   348→                };
   349→
   350→                for (let i = 0; i < textParts.length; i++) {
   351→                    const part = textParts[i];
   352→
   353→                    if (isSkippable(part)) continue;
   354→
   355→                    // First short text (2-15 chars, pure CJK/letters) is likely the name
   356→                    if (!name && part.length >= 2 && part.length <= 15) {
   357→                        if (/^[\u4e00-\u9fa5a-zA-Z·\s]+$/.test(part)) {
   358→                            name = part;
   359→                            continue;
   360→                        }
   361→                    }
   362→
   363→                    // After name, next substantial text is company+position
   364→                    if (name && !company && part.length > 2) {
   365→                        // Try to split company and position using regex patterns
   366→                        let splitDone = false;
   367→                        for (const pattern of jobPatterns) {
   368→                            const match = part.match(pattern);
   369→                            if (match && match.index > 0) {
   370→                                company = part.substring(0, match.index).trim();
   371→                                title = match[0].trim();
   372→                                splitDone = true;
   373→                                break;
   374→                            }
   375→                        }
   376→                        if (!splitDone) {
   377→                            company = part;
   378→                        }
   379→                        continue;
   380→                    }
   381→
   382→                    // Next part is industry|department info
   383→                    if (name && company && !industry && part.length > 2) {
   384→                        industry = part;
   385→                        // If title wasn't split from company, use industry as fallback context
   386→                        if (!title) {
   387→                            title = industry;
   388→                        }
   389→                        break;
   390→                    }
   391→                }
   392→
   393→                // Skip if no name found or premium placeholder
   394→                if (!name) continue;
   395→                if (name === '脉脉高价值人脉') continue;
   396→
   397→                // Extract user ID from DOM patterns on card and ancestor elements.
   398→                // Two patterns exist:
   399→                //   1. contactcard_{numeric_id} — on ancestors (colleagues layout)
   400→                //   2. member_entry_{numeric_id} — on descendants (standard layout)
   401→                let userId = '';
   402→
   403→                // Check ancestors for numeric contactcard_{id}
   404→                let el = card;
   405→                while (el) {
   406→                    const elId = el.id || '';
   407→                    const ccMatch = elId.match(/^contactcard_(\d+)$/);
   408→                    if (ccMatch) {
   409→                        userId = ccMatch[1];
   410→                        break;
   411→                    }
   412→                    el = el.parentElement;
   413→                }
   414→
   415→                // Check descendants for member_entry_{id} (most common pattern)
   416→                if (!userId) {
   417→                    const meEl = card.querySelector('[id^="member_entry_"]');
   418→                    if (meEl) {
   419→                        const meMatch = meEl.id.match(/^member_entry_(\d+)$/);
   420→                        if (meMatch) {
   421→                            userId = meMatch[1];
   422→                        }
   423→                    }
   424→                }
   425→
   426→                // Also check ancestor descendants for contactcard with numeric ID
   427→                if (!userId) {
   428→                    const ccEl = card.querySelector('[id^="contactcard_"]');
   429→                    if (ccEl) {
   430→                        const ccMatch = ccEl.id.match(/^contactcard_(\d+)$/);
   431→                        if (ccMatch) {
   432→                            userId = ccMatch[1];
   433→                        }
   434→                    }
   435→                }
   436→
   437→                // Use real user_id as maimai_id when available, fall back to hash
   438→                let maimaiId;
   439→                if (userId) {
   440→                    maimaiId = 'mm_' + userId;
   441→                } else {
   442→                    const idSource = (name || '') + '|' + (company || '') + '|' + (title || '');
   443→                    let hash = 0;
   444→                    for (let j = 0; j < idSource.length; j++) {
   445→                        const ch = idSource.charCodeAt(j);
   446→                        hash = ((hash << 5) - hash) + ch;
   447→                        hash = hash & hash; // Convert to 32bit integer
   448→                    }
   449→                    maimaiId = 'mm_' + Math.abs(hash).toString(16).padStart(8, '0');
   450→                }
   451→
   452→                // Skip duplicates based on the computed ID
   453→                if (seenNames.has(maimaiId)) continue;
   454→                seenNames.add(maimaiId);
   455→
   456→                // Build profile URL from user ID when available
   457→                let profileUrl = '';
   458→                if (userId) {
   459→                    profileUrl = 'https://maimai.cn/contact/detail/' + userId + '?dstu=' + userId;
   460→                }
   461→
   462→                // Fallback: extract profile URL from <a> tags inside the card
   463→                if (!profileUrl) {
   464→                    let fallbackUrl = '';
   465→
   466→                    // First: check <a> ancestors between img and card
   467→                    let ancestor = img.parentElement;
   468→                    while (ancestor && ancestor !== card) {
   469→                        if (ancestor.tagName === 'A' && ancestor.href) {
   470→                            const href = ancestor.getAttribute('href') || '';
   471→                            if (href.includes('/profile/detail') || href.includes('/contact/detail/') || href.includes('/u/') || href.includes('egid=') || href.includes('dstu=')) {
   472→                                profileUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
   473→                                break;
   474→                            }
   475→                        }
   476→                        ancestor = ancestor.parentElement;
   477→                    }
   478→
   479→                    // Second: search all <a> descendants inside the card
   480→                    if (!profileUrl) {
   481→                        const links = card.querySelectorAll('a[href]');
   482→                        for (const link of links) {
   483→                            const href = link.getAttribute('href') || '';
   484→                            if (href.includes('/profile/detail') || href.includes('/contact/detail/') || href.includes('/u/') || href.includes('egid=') || href.includes('dstu=')) {
   485→                                profileUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
   486→                                break;
   487→                            }
   488→                            if (!fallbackUrl && href && !href.startsWith('javascript:') && (href.startsWith('/') || href.includes('maimai.cn'))) {
   489→                                fallbackUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
   490→                            }
   491→                        }
   492→                    }
   493→                    if (!profileUrl && fallbackUrl) {
   494→                        profileUrl = fallbackUrl;
   495→                    }
   496→                }
   497→
   498→                // Extract location: look for remaining short text parts after name/company/title
   499→                // Common patterns: city names like "北京", "上海", "深圳" etc.
   500→                let location = '';
   501→                const locationPatterns = /^(北京|上海|广州|深圳|杭州|成都|南京|武汉|西安|苏州|长沙|天津|重庆|郑州|东莞|青岛|大连|宁波|厦门|合肥|佛山|福州|昆明|济南|珠海|无锡|常州|海外|远程|香港|台北|新加坡|美国|日本|韩国|英国|全国|其他)/;
   502→                for (let i = 0; i < textParts.length; i++) {
   503→                    const part = textParts[i];
   504→                    if (part === name || part === company || part === title || part === industry) continue;
   505→                    if (isSkippable(part)) continue;
   506→                    if (locationPatterns.test(part) && part.length <= 10) {
   507→                        location = part;
   508→                        break;
   509→                    }
   510→                }
   511→
   512→                candidates.push({
   513→                    name: name,
   514→                    title: title || '',
   515→                    company: company || '',
   516→                    maimai_id: maimaiId,
   517→                    profile_url: profileUrl,
   518→                    location: location,
   519→                });
   520→            }
   521→
   522→            return candidates;
   523→        }''')
   524→
   525→        logger.info(f"JavaScript extraction found {len(candidates_data)} candidates")
   526→
   527→        for data in candidates_data:
   528→            if data.get('name'):
   529→                candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
   530→                    maimai_id=data.get('maimai_id', ''),
   531→                    name=data.get('name', ''),
   532→                    title=data.get('title', ''),
   533→                    company=data.get('company', ''),
   534→                    location=data.get('location', ''),
   535→                    profile_url=data.get('profile_url', '')
   536→                ))
   537→
   538→        # For candidates missing profile_url, try extracting from contactcard DOM
   539→        missing_url = [c for c in candidates if not c.profile_url]
   540→        if missing_url:
   541→            logger.info(f"{len(missing_url)} candidates missing profile_url, searching contactcard DOM")
   542→            for c in missing_url:
   543→                try:
   544→                    profile_url = await _click_avatar_for_profile_url(page, c.name, c.company)
   545→                    if profile_url:
   546→                        c.profile_url = profile_url
   547→                except Exception as e:
   548→                    logger.debug(f"Contactcard lookup failed for '{c.name}': {e}")
   549→
   550→        # Fallback: Strategy 1 - Find all profile links directly
   551→        if not candidates:
   552→            profile_links = await page.query_selector_all('a[href*="/contact/"], a[href*="/u/"], a[href*="egid="], a[href*="profile"]')
   553→        else:
   554→            profile_links = []
   555→
   556→        if profile_links and not candidates:
   557→            logger.debug(f"Found {len(profile_links)} profile links")
   558→
   559→            seen_ids = set()
   560→            for link in profile_links:
   561→                try:
   562→                    href = await link.get_attribute('href')
   563→                    if not href:
   564→                        continue
   565→
   566→                    # Extract maimai_id from URL
   567→                    maimai_id = None
   568→                    if '/contact/detail/' in href:
   569→                        maimai_id = href.split('/contact/detail/')[-1].split('?')[0].split('/')[0]
   570→                    elif '/u/' in href:
   571→                        maimai_id = href.split('/u/')[-1].split('?')[0].split('/')[0]
   572→
   573→                    if not maimai_id or maimai_id in seen_ids:
   574→                        continue
   575→                    seen_ids.add(maimai_id)
   576→
   577→                    # Get name from link text
   578→                    name = await link.inner_text()
   579→                    name = name.strip()
   580→                    if not name or len(name) > 50:  # Skip if no name or too long (probably not a name)
   581→                        continue
   582→
   583→                    # Try to get parent container for more info
   584→                    parent = await link.evaluate_handle('el => el.closest("div, li, article") || el.parentElement.parentElement')
   585→
   586→                    title = ""
   587→                    company = ""
   588→
   589→                    if parent:
   590→                        # Get all text content and try to parse
   591→                        try:
   592→                            full_text = await parent.inner_text()
   593→                            lines = [l.strip() for l in full_text.split('\n') if l.strip()]
   594→
   595→                            # Usually: name, then title/company info
   596→                            for line in lines:
   597→                                if line == name:
   598→                                    continue
   599→                                if '好友' in line or '关注' in line:
   600→                                    continue
   601→                                if not title and len(line) < 50:
   602→                                    title = line
   603→                                elif not company and len(line) < 50:
   604→                                    company = line
   605→                                    break
   606→                        except Exception:
   607→                            pass
   608→
   609→                    profile_url = href if href.startswith('http') else f"https://maimai.cn{href}"
   610→
   611→                    candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
   612→                        maimai_id=maimai_id,
   613→                        name=name,
   614→                        title=title,
   615→                        company=company,
   616→                        profile_url=profile_url
   617→                    ))
   618→
   619→                except Exception as e:
   620→                    logger.debug(f"Failed to extract from link: {e}")
   621→                    continue
   622→
   623→        # Strategy 2: If no links found, try button-based detection
   624→        if not candidates:
   625→            logger.debug("Trying button-based detection")
   626→            buttons = await page.query_selector_all('button:has-text("好友"), button:has-text("关注")')
   627→
   628→            for button in buttons:
   629→                try:
   630→                    parent = await button.evaluate_handle('el => el.closest("div, li, article")')
   631→                    if not parent:
   632→                        continue
   633→
   634→                    # Find link in parent
   635→                    link = await parent.query_selector('a[href*="/contact"], a[href*="/u/"]')
   636→                    if link:
   637→                        href = await link.get_attribute('href')
   638→                        name = await link.inner_text()
   639→
   640→                        maimai_id = None
   641→                        if '/contact/detail/' in href:
   642→                            maimai_id = href.split('/contact/detail/')[-1].split('?')[0]
   643→                        elif '/u/' in href:
   644→                            maimai_id = href.split('/u/')[-1].split('?')[0]
   645→
   646→                        if maimai_id and name:
   647→                            candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
   648→                                maimai_id=maimai_id,
   649→                                name=name.strip(),
   650→                                title="",
   651→                                company="",
   652→                                profile_url=href
   653→                            ))
   654→                except Exception:
   655→                    continue
   656→
   657→        # Filter out premium placeholder profiles
   658→        before_filter = len(candidates)
   659→        candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.name not in PREMIUM_PLACEHOLDER_NAMES]
   660→        filtered_count = before_filter - len(candidates)
   661→        if filtered_count > 0:
   662→            logger.info(f"Filtered out {filtered_count} premium placeholder profiles")
   663→
   664→        logger.info(f"Extracted {len(candidates)} candidates from page")
   665→
   666→    except Exception as e:
   667→        logger.error(f"Error extracting search results: {e}")
   668→
   669→    return candidates
   670→

   672→def _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates: List[CandidateBasic], source_search: str) -> None:
   673→    """
   674→    Save or update candidates in database.
   675→
   676→    Args:
   677→        db_manager: Database manager instance
   678→        candidates: List of candidates to save
   679→        source_search: Search keywords that found these candidates
   680→    """
   681→    try:
   682→        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   683→            # Batch pre-fetch existing candidates to avoid N+1 queries
   684→            maimai_ids = [c.maimai_id for c in candidates]
   685→            existing_by_id = {
   686→                row.maimai_id: row
   687→                for row in session.query(Candidate).filter(
   688→                    Candidate.maimai_id.in_(maimai_ids)
   689→                ).all()
   690→            }
   691→
   692→            # Also batch-fetch by name+company for dedup
   693→            name_company_pairs = [(c.name, c.company) for c in candidates]
   694→            from sqlalchemy import tuple_
   695→            existing_by_name = {}
   696→            if name_company_pairs:
   697→                for row in session.query(Candidate).filter(
   698→                    tuple_(Candidate.name, Candidate.company).in_(name_company_pairs)
   699→                ).all():
   700→                    existing_by_name[(row.name, row.company)] = row
   701→
   702→            for c in candidates:
   703→                existing = existing_by_id.get(c.maimai_id)
   704→                if not existing:
   705→                    existing = existing_by_name.get((c.name, c.company))
   706→
   707→                if existing:
   708→                    existing.name = c.name
   709→                    existing.title = c.title
   710→                    existing.company = c.company
   711→                    existing.location = c.location
   712→                    existing.profile_url = c.profile_url
   713→                else:
   714→                    candidate = Candidate(
   715→                        maimai_id=c.maimai_id,
   716→                        name=c.name,
   717→                        title=c.title,
   718→                        company=c.company,
   719→                        location=c.location,
   720→                        profile_url=c.profile_url,
   721→                        source_search=source_search
   722→                    )
   723→                    session.add(candidate)
   724→
   725→            logger.debug(f"Saved {len(candidates)} candidates to database")
   726→
   727→    except Exception as e:
   728→        logger.error(f"Failed to save candidates: {e}")
   729→

   756→async def _click_avatar_for_profile_url(page: Page, name: str, company: str) -> Optional[str]:
   757→    """Try to extract profile URL for a candidate from the DOM contactcard pattern.
   758→
   759→    Searches the current page for a contactcard element whose parent card
   760→    contains the candidate's name (and optionally company), then constructs
   761→    the profile URL from the extracted user ID.
   762→
   763→    Args:
   764→        page: Playwright page on the search results
   765→        name: Candidate name to match
   766→        company: Candidate company to help disambiguate
   767→
   768→    Returns:
   769→        Profile URL string, or None if not found
   770→    """
   771→    try:
   772→        user_id = await page.evaluate('''(args) => {
   773→            const { name, company } = args;
   774→            // Check contactcard_{numeric_id} ancestors
   775→            const ccElements = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="contactcard_"]');
   776→            for (const el of ccElements) {
   777→                const text = el.textContent || '';
   778→                if (!text.includes(name)) continue;
   779→                if (company && !text.includes(company)) continue;
   780→                const match = el.id.match(/^contactcard_(\\d+)$/);
   781→                if (match) return match[1];
   782→            }
   783→            // Check member_entry_{numeric_id} descendants
   784→            const meElements = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="member_entry_"]');
   785→            for (const el of meElements) {
   786→                // Walk up to find the card containing this member_entry
   787→                let card = el.parentElement;
   788→                for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
   789→                    const text = card.textContent || '';
   790→                    if (text.includes(name) && (!company || text.includes(company))) {
   791→                        const match = el.id.match(/^member_entry_(\\d+)$/);
   792→                        if (match) return match[1];
   793→                    }
   794→                    card = card.parentElement;
   795→                }
   796→            }
   797→            return null;
   798→        }''', {'name': name, 'company': company})
   799→
   800→        if user_id:
   801→            profile_url = f"https://maimai.cn/contact/detail/{user_id}?dstu={user_id}"
   802→            logger.info(f"Resolved profile_url for '{name}' via contactcard: {profile_url}")
   803→            return profile_url
   804→
   805→        logger.debug(f"No contactcard found for '{name}'")
   806→        return None
   807→
   808→    except Exception as e:
   809→        logger.debug(f"_click_avatar_for_profile_url error for '{name}': {e}")
   810→        return None
   811→
   812→
   813→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   814→# Enterprise recruitment path (Path B)
   815→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   816→
   817→MAIMAI_HOME_URL = "https://maimai.cn"
   818→ENTERPRISE_URL_MARKER = "ent/talents/discover"
   819→
   820→
   821→async def search_candidates_enterprise(
   822→    keywords: str,
   823→    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
   824→    pages: int = 1,
   825→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   826→    keep_tab_open: bool = False,
   827→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   828→    """Search for candidates via the enterprise recruitment path.
   829→
   830→    Flow:
   831→    1. Switch to primary tab -> navigate to homepage -> click "招聘" tab (opens new tab)
   832→    2. Wait for enterprise page to load
   833→    3. Add keyword filter -> submit
   834→    4. Optionally add company filter
   835→    5. Extract candidates from enterprise card layout
   836→    6. For additional pages, scroll to trigger infinite scroll
   837→    7. Close enterprise tab unless keep_tab_open is True
   838→
   839→    Args:
   840→        keywords: Search keywords
   841→        company: Filter by company names (optional)
   842→        pages: Number of scroll-pages to extract
   843→        browser: Browser manager instance
   844→        keep_tab_open: If True, leave enterprise tab open (for inline messaging)
   845→
   846→    Returns:
   847→        List of CandidateBasic objects
   848→    """
   849→    validate_keywords(keywords)
   850→
   851→    if browser is None:
   852→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   853→
   854→    config = get_config()
   855→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   856→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   857→
   858→    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   859→
   860→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   861→    enterprise_tab_opened = False
   862→
   863→    with Progress(
   864→        SpinnerColumn(),
   865→        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
   866→        console=console,
   867→    ) as progress:
   868→        task = progress.add_task("Opening enterprise recruitment...", total=None)
   869→
   870→        try:
   871→            await async_check_rate_limit("search")
   872→
   873→            # Always start from the primary tab to avoid navigating user's open content
   874→            browser.switch_to_primary_tab()
   875→            page = browser.page
   876→
   877→            # Step 1: Navigate to homepage and click 招聘 tab
   878→            await retry_navigation(page, MAIMAI_HOME_URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
   879→            await async_random_delay("page_load")
   880→
   881→            sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.recruitment_tab")
   882→            recruitment_tab = await page.wait_for_selector(sel, timeout=5000)
   883→            if not recruitment_tab:
   884→                raise SelectorNotFoundError(f"Could not find recruitment tab: {sel}")
   885→
   886→            # Click opens a new tab — use BrowserManager API
   887→            await recruitment_tab.click()
   888→            page = await browser.wait_for_new_tab(timeout=15000)
   889→            enterprise_tab_opened = True
   890→
   891→            progress.update(task, description="Enterprise page loaded")
   892→
   893→            # Wait for the enterprise page URL
   894→            try:
   895→                await page.wait_for_url(
   896→                    lambda url: ENTERPRISE_URL_MARKER in url,
   897→                    timeout=15000,
   898→                )
   899→            except Exception:
   900→                logger.warning(f"Enterprise URL marker not found, current URL: {page.url}")
   901→
   902→            await async_random_delay("action")
   903→
   904→            # Step 2: Add keyword
   905→            progress.update(task, description=f"Adding keyword: {keywords}")
   906→
   907→            add_kw_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.add_keyword_button")
   908→            add_kw_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(add_kw_sel, timeout=5000)
   909→            if add_kw_btn:
   910→                await add_kw_btn.click()
   911→                await async_random_delay("action")
   912→
   913→            kw_input_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.keyword_input")
   914→            await page.wait_for_selector(kw_input_sel, timeout=5000)
   915→            await human_type(page, kw_input_sel, keywords)
   916→            await async_random_delay("action")
   917→
   918→            kw_submit_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.keyword_submit")
   919→            submit_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(kw_submit_sel, timeout=3000)
   920→            if submit_btn:
   921→                await submit_btn.click()
   922→                await async_random_delay("page_load")
   923→
   924→            # Step 3: Add company filter if specified
   925→            if company:
   926→                progress.update(task, description="Adding company filter...")
   927→                add_co_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.add_company_button")
   928→                add_co_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(add_co_sel, timeout=5000)
   929→                if add_co_btn:
   930→                    await add_co_btn.click()
   931→                    await async_random_delay("action")
   932→
   933→                co_input_sel = config.get_selector("enterprise.company_input")
   934→                for co_name in company:
   935→                    await page.wait_for_selector(co_input_sel, timeout=5000)
   936→                    await human_type(page, co_input_sel, co_name)
   937→                    await async_random_delay("action")
   938→
   939→                    # Click suggestion dropdown item
   940→                    try:
   941→                        suggestion = await page.wait_for_selector(
   942→                            f"text='{co_name}'", timeout=3000
   943→                        )
   944→                        if suggestion:
   945→                            await suggestion.click()
   946→                            await async_random_delay("action")
   947→                    except Exception:
   948→                        logger.debug(f"Company suggestion not found for: {co_name}")
   949→
   950→            # Step 4: Wait for results and extract
   951→            await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
   952→            await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   953→
   954→            for page_num in range(1, pages + 1):
   955→                progress.update(task, description=f"Extracting page {page_num}/{pages}...")
   956→
   957→                candidates = await _extract_enterprise_results(page)
   958→
   959→                if not candidates:
   960→                    logger.info(f"No enterprise results on page {page_num}")
   961→                    break
   962→
   963→                # Filter non-R&D roles
   964→                before_filter = len(candidates)
   965→                candidates = [c for c in candidates if not _is_non_rd_title(c.title)]
   966→                filtered = before_filter - len(candidates)
   967→                if filtered > 0:
   968→                    logger.info(f"Filtered out {filtered} non-R&D candidates")
   969→
   970→                all_candidates.extend(candidates)
   971→                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Found {len(candidates)} candidates")
   972→
   973→                rate_limiter.log_action("search", {
   974→                    "keywords": keywords,
   975→                    "page": page_num,
   976→                    "results": len(candidates),
   977→                    "mode": "enterprise",
   978→                })
   979→
   980→                _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates, keywords)
   981→
   982→                # Scroll for next page (infinite scroll)
   983→                if page_num < pages:
   984→                    await human_scroll(page, "down", distance=800)
   985→                    await async_random_delay("page_load")
   986→                    await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
   987→
   988→        except Exception as e:
   989→            logger.error(f"Enterprise search error: {e}")
   990→            await browser.screenshot("enterprise_search_error")
   991→            progress.update(task, description=f"Error: {str(e)[:40]}")
   992→        finally:
   993→            # Close the enterprise tab unless caller wants it open for inline messaging
   994→            if enterprise_tab_opened and not keep_tab_open:
   995→                try:
   996→                    await browser.close_current_tab()
   997→                except Exception:
   998→                    pass
   999→
  1000→    _log_search_history(db_manager, keywords, company, None, pages, len(all_candidates))
  1001→
  1002→    console.print(f"[green]Enterprise search complete. Found {len(all_candidates)} candidates.[/green]")
  1003→    return all_candidates
  1004→
  1005→
  1006→async def _extract_enterprise_results(page: Page) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
  1007→    """Extract candidate information from enterprise recruitment results page.
  1008→
  1009→    The enterprise UI has a different card layout from search_center.
  1010→    Uses JS-based extraction tailored to the enterprise talent cards.
  1011→
  1012→    Args:
  1013→        page: Playwright page instance on the enterprise results page
  1014→
  1015→    Returns:
  1016→        List of CandidateBasic objects
  1017→    """
  1018→    candidates = []
  1019→
  1020→    try:
  1021→        await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=10000)
  1022→    except Exception:
  1023→        pass
  1024→
  1025→    try:
  1026→        candidates_data = await page.evaluate('''() => {
  1027→            const candidates = [];
  1028→            const seenIds = new Set();
  1029→
  1030→            // Enterprise talent cards typically have a structured layout
  1031→            // Try multiple selectors for the card containers
  1032→            const cardSelectors = [
  1033→                '[class*="talent-card"]',
  1034→                '[class*="candidate-card"]',
  1035→                '[class*="recommend-card"]',
  1036→                '[class*="talent-item"]',
  1037→                '[class*="card-wrap"]',
  1038→            ];
  1039→
  1040→            let cards = [];
  1041→            for (const sel of cardSelectors) {
  1042→                cards = document.querySelectorAll(sel);
  1043→                if (cards.length > 0) break;
  1044→            }
  1045→
  1046→            // Fallback: find cards by avatar image pattern (same as search_center)
  1047→            if (cards.length === 0) {
  1048→                const images = document.querySelectorAll('img');
  1049→                const foundCards = [];
  1050→
  1051→                for (const img of images) {
  1052→                    const rect = img.getBoundingClientRect();
  1053→                    if (rect.width > 100 || rect.height > 100) continue;
  1054→                    if (rect.width < 30 || rect.height < 30) continue;
  1055→
  1056→                    let card = img.parentElement;
  1057→                    for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
  1058→                        const cardRect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
  1059→                        if (cardRect.width > 200 && cardRect.height > 80) {
  1060→                            break;
  1061→                        }
  1062→                        card = card.parentElement;
  1063→                    }
  1064→                    if (card) foundCards.push(card);
  1065→                }
  1066→                cards = foundCards;
  1067→            }
  1068→
  1069→            for (const card of cards) {
  1070→                const textParts = [];
  1071→                const walker = document.createTreeWalker(card, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT, null, false);
  1072→                while (walker.nextNode()) {
  1073→                    const text = walker.currentNode.textContent.trim();
  1074→                    if (text && text.length > 0 && text.length < 100) {
  1075→                        textParts.push(text);
  1076→                    }
  1077→                }
  1078→
  1079→                let name = '';
  1080→                let company = '';
  1081→                let title = '';
  1082→
  1083→                const skipPatterns = [
  1084→                    /^立即沟通$/,
  1085→                    /^不合适$/,
  1086→                    /^感兴趣$/,
  1087→                    /^不感兴趣$/,
  1088→                    /^(\\d+\\s*)?年/,
  1089→                    /^[|｜·]$/,
  1090→                    /^在线|^离线|^活跃/,
  1091→                ];
  1092→
  1093→                const isSkippable = (text) => {
  1094→                    return skipPatterns.some(p => p.test(text));
  1095→                };
  1096→
  1097→                for (let i = 0; i < textParts.length; i++) {
  1098→                    const part = textParts[i];
  1099→                    if (isSkippable(part)) continue;
  1100→
  1101→                    if (!name && part.length >= 2 && part.length <= 15) {
  1102→                        if (/^[\\u4e00-\\u9fa5a-zA-Z·\\s]+$/.test(part)) {
  1103→                            name = part;
  1104→                            continue;
  1105→                        }
  1106→                    }
  1107→
  1108→                    if (name && !company && part.length > 1) {
  1109→                        company = part;
  1110→                        continue;
  1111→                    }
  1112→
  1113→                    if (name && company && !title && part.length > 1) {
  1114→                        title = part;
  1115→                        break;
  1116→                    }
  1117→                }
  1118→
  1119→                if (!name) continue;
  1120→
  1121→                const idSource = (name || '') + '|' + (company || '') + '|' + (title || '');
  1122→                let hash = 0;
  1123→                for (let j = 0; j < idSource.length; j++) {
  1124→                    const ch = idSource.charCodeAt(j);
  1125→                    hash = ((hash << 5) - hash) + ch;
  1126→                    hash = hash & hash;
  1127→                }
  1128→                const maimaiId = 'mm_' + Math.abs(hash).toString(16).padStart(8, '0');
  1129→
  1130→                if (seenIds.has(maimaiId)) continue;
  1131→                seenIds.add(maimaiId);
  1132→
  1133→                // Try to extract profile URL
  1134→                let profileUrl = '';
  1135→                const links = card.querySelectorAll('a[href]');
  1136→                for (const link of links) {
  1137→                    const href = link.getAttribute('href') || '';
  1138→                    if (href.includes('/profile/detail') || href.includes('/contact/detail/') || href.includes('dstu=') || href.includes('egid=')) {
  1139→                        profileUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
  1140→                        break;
  1141→                    }
  1142→                }
  1143→
  1144→                candidates.push({
  1145→                    name: name,
  1146→                    title: title || '',
  1147→                    company: company || '',
  1148→                    maimai_id: maimaiId,
  1149→                    profile_url: profileUrl,
  1150→                    location: '',
  1151→                });
  1152→            }
  1153→
  1154→            return candidates;
  1155→        }''')
  1156→
  1157→        logger.info(f"Enterprise extraction found {len(candidates_data)} candidates")
  1158→
  1159→        for data in candidates_data:
  1160→            if data.get("name"):
  1161→                candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
  1162→                    maimai_id=data.get("maimai_id", ""),
  1163→                    name=data.get("name", ""),
  1164→                    title=data.get("title", ""),
  1165→                    company=data.get("company", ""),
  1166→                    location=data.get("location", ""),
  1167→                    profile_url=data.get("profile_url", ""),
  1168→                ))
  1169→
  1170→        # Filter out premium placeholders
  1171→        candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.name not in PREMIUM_PLACEHOLDER_NAMES]
  1172→
  1173→        logger.info(f"Enterprise: extracted {len(candidates)} candidates from page")
  1174→
  1175→    except Exception as e:
  1176→        logger.error(f"Error extracting enterprise results: {e}")
  1177→
  1178→    return candidates
  1179→

1→"""Feature modules for Maimai Assistant."""
     2→

1→"""Interactive selector discovery for chat pages.
     2→
     3→When automatic selectors fail, this module pauses execution and lets
     4→the user manually navigate to the correct chat page in the browser.
     5→It then inspects the DOM to discover working selectors, which are
     6→reused for all remaining candidates in the session.
     7→"""
     8→
     9→import asyncio
    10→from dataclasses import dataclass
    11→from typing import Optional
    12→
    13→from patchright.async_api import Page
    14→from loguru import logger
    15→from rich.console import Console
    16→from rich.panel import Panel
    17→from rich.text import Text
    18→
    19→from src.core.anti_detection import human_type, human_click
    20→from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    21→
    22→console = Console()
    23→
    24→# JavaScript to scan DOM for interactive elements
    25→DISCOVER_ELEMENTS_JS = """
    26→() => {
    27→    const results = [];
    28→
    29→    // Find visible buttons
    30→    const buttons = document.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"], a[class*="btn"], div[class*="btn"]');
    31→    buttons.forEach((el, i) => {
    32→        const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
    33→        if (rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0) {
    34→            const text = (el.textContent || '').trim().substring(0, 50);
    35→            const tag = el.tagName.toLowerCase();
    36→            const classes = el.className ? String(el.className).substring(0, 80) : '';
    37→            const id = el.id || '';
    38→            results.push({
    39→                type: 'button',
    40→                index: results.length,
    41→                tag: tag,
    42→                text: text,
    43→                classes: classes,
    44→                id: id,
    45→                selector: id ? `#${id}` : (classes ? `${tag}.${String(el.className).split(' ')[0]}` : `${tag}:nth-of-type(${i+1})`),
    46→            });
    47→        }
    48→    });
    49→
    50→    // Find visible textareas and contenteditable elements
    51→    const inputs = document.querySelectorAll('textarea, [contenteditable="true"], input[type="text"]');
    52→    inputs.forEach((el, i) => {
    53→        const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
    54→        if (rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0) {
    55→            const tag = el.tagName.toLowerCase();
    56→            const classes = el.className ? String(el.className).substring(0, 80) : '';
    57→            const id = el.id || '';
    58→            const placeholder = el.getAttribute('placeholder') || '';
    59→            const contenteditable = el.getAttribute('contenteditable') || '';
    60→            results.push({
    61→                type: 'input',
    62→                index: results.length,
    63→                tag: tag,
    64→                text: placeholder,
    65→                classes: classes,
    66→                id: id,
    67→                contenteditable: contenteditable,
    68→                selector: id ? `#${id}` : (classes ? `${tag}.${String(el.className).split(' ')[0]}` : (contenteditable ? '[contenteditable="true"]' : `${tag}:nth-of-type(${i+1})`)),
    69→            });
    70→        }
    71→    });
    72→
    73→    return results;
    74→}
    75→"""
    76→
    77→MAX_DISCOVERY_RETRIES = 3
    78→
    79→
    80→@dataclass
    81→class DiscoveredSelectors:
    82→    """Session-scoped container for discovered chat page selectors."""
    83→
    84→    chat_button: Optional[str] = None
    85→    message_input: Optional[str] = None
    86→    send_button: Optional[str] = None
    87→    chat_url_pattern: Optional[str] = None
    88→    skip_chat_button: bool = False
    89→    is_populated: bool = False
    90→
    91→
    92→async def discover_chat_page(
    93→    page: Page,
    94→    maimai_id: str,
    95→    browser,
    96→) -> DiscoveredSelectors:
    97→    """
    98→    Interactive flow to discover chat page selectors.
    99→
   100→    Pauses execution and instructs the user to manually navigate to the
   101→    chat page in the browser. Then inspects the DOM and lets the user
   102→    select which elements are the message input and send button.
   103→
   104→    Args:
   105→        page: Current Playwright page
   106→        maimai_id: Current candidate's Maimai ID (used to derive URL pattern)
   107→        browser: BrowserManager instance
   108→
   109→    Returns:
   110→        Populated DiscoveredSelectors instance
   111→    """
   112→    discovered = DiscoveredSelectors()
   113→    loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
   114→
   115→    # Step 1: Instruct user to navigate to chat page
   116→    instructions = Text()
   117→    instructions.append("Automatic chat selectors not found.\n\n", style="bold red")
   118→    instructions.append("Please do the following in the browser window:\n", style="bold")
   119→    instructions.append("1. Navigate to the chat/message page for this candidate\n")
   120→    instructions.append("2. Make sure the message input is visible on screen\n")
   121→    instructions.append("3. Come back here and press Enter when ready\n\n")
   122→    instructions.append(f"Candidate ID: ", style="dim")
   123→    instructions.append(f"{maimai_id}", style="cyan")
   124→
   125→    console.print(Panel(
   126→        instructions,
   127→        title="Interactive Selector Discovery",
   128→        border_style="yellow",
   129→        padding=(1, 2),
   130→    ))
   131→
   132→    for attempt in range(1, MAX_DISCOVERY_RETRIES + 1):
   133→        await loop.run_in_executor(None, lambda: input("\nPress Enter when the chat page is ready..."))
   134→
   135→        # Step 2: Capture current URL and derive pattern
   136→        current_url = page.url
   137→        logger.debug(f"Current URL after user navigation: {current_url}")
   138→
   139→        if maimai_id in current_url:
   140→            discovered.chat_url_pattern = current_url.replace(maimai_id, "{maimai_id}")
   141→            console.print(f"[green]URL pattern detected:[/green] {discovered.chat_url_pattern}")
   142→        else:
   143→            console.print("[yellow]Could not derive URL pattern (maimai_id not found in URL).[/yellow]")
   144→            console.print(f"[dim]Current URL: {current_url}[/dim]")
   145→
   146→        # Step 3: Scan DOM for elements
   147→        elements = await page.evaluate(DISCOVER_ELEMENTS_JS)
   148→
   149→        if not elements:
   150→            console.print(f"[yellow]No interactive elements found (attempt {attempt}/{MAX_DISCOVERY_RETRIES}).[/yellow]")
   151→            if attempt < MAX_DISCOVERY_RETRIES:
   152→                console.print("[dim]Make sure the chat page is fully loaded and try again.[/dim]")
   153→                continue
   154→            else:
   155→                console.print("[red]Giving up after max retries. Selector discovery failed.[/red]")
   156→                return discovered
   157→
   158→        # Step 4: Display discovered elements
   159→        input_elements = [e for e in elements if e['type'] == 'input']
   160→        button_elements = [e for e in elements if e['type'] == 'button']
   161→
   162→        # Select message input
   163→        if input_elements:
   164→            console.print("\n[bold cyan]Input elements found:[/bold cyan]")
   165→            for i, el in enumerate(input_elements):
   166→                label = el.get('text') or el.get('classes', '') or el['tag']
   167→                console.print(f"  [{i}] {el['tag']} - {label} (selector: {el['selector']})")
   168→
   169→            choice = await loop.run_in_executor(
   170→                None,
   171→                lambda: input(f"\nSelect message input [0-{len(input_elements)-1}] (default 0): ").strip()
   172→            )
   173→            idx = int(choice) if choice.isdigit() and int(choice) < len(input_elements) else 0
   174→            discovered.message_input = input_elements[idx]['selector']
   175→            console.print(f"[green]Message input:[/green] {discovered.message_input}")
   176→        else:
   177→            console.print("[yellow]No input elements found.[/yellow]")
   178→            if attempt < MAX_DISCOVERY_RETRIES:
   179→                continue
   180→            return discovered
   181→
   182→        # Select send button
   183→        if button_elements:
   184→            console.print("\n[bold cyan]Button elements found:[/bold cyan]")
   185→            for i, el in enumerate(button_elements):
   186→                label = el.get('text') or el.get('classes', '') or el['tag']
   187→                console.print(f"  [{i}] {el['tag']} - \"{label}\" (selector: {el['selector']})")
   188→
   189→            choice = await loop.run_in_executor(
   190→                None,
   191→                lambda: input(f"\nSelect send button [0-{len(button_elements)-1}]: ").strip()
   192→            )
   193→            if choice.isdigit() and int(choice) < len(button_elements):
   194→                discovered.send_button = button_elements[int(choice)]['selector']
   195→                console.print(f"[green]Send button:[/green] {discovered.send_button}")
   196→            else:
   197→                console.print("[yellow]No send button selected.[/yellow]")
   198→
   199→        # Step 5: Ask about chat button
   200→        needs_chat = await loop.run_in_executor(
   201→            None,
   202→            lambda: input("\nDoes reaching the chat page require clicking a button first? [y/N]: ").strip().lower()
   203→        )
   204→
   205→        if needs_chat == 'y':
   206→            console.print("\n[bold cyan]Select the chat button from the button list above:[/bold cyan]")
   207→            choice = await loop.run_in_executor(
   208→                None,
   209→                lambda: input(f"Chat button index [0-{len(button_elements)-1}]: ").strip()
   210→            )
   211→            if choice.isdigit() and int(choice) < len(button_elements):
   212→                discovered.chat_button = button_elements[int(choice)]['selector']
   213→                console.print(f"[green]Chat button:[/green] {discovered.chat_button}")
   214→        else:
   215→            discovered.skip_chat_button = True
   216→
   217→        # Mark as populated if we have at least message_input
   218→        if discovered.message_input:
   219→            discovered.is_populated = True
   220→            console.print(Panel(
   221→                "[green]Selector discovery complete! These selectors will be reused for remaining candidates.[/green]",
   222→                border_style="green",
   223→            ))
   224→            break
   225→
   226→    return discovered
   227→
   228→
   229→async def apply_discovered_selectors(
   230→    page: Page,
   231→    maimai_id: str,
   232→    discovered: DiscoveredSelectors,
   233→    content: str,
   234→) -> bool:
   235→    """
   236→    Send a message using previously discovered selectors.
   237→
   238→    Args:
   239→        page: Playwright page instance
   240→        maimai_id: Candidate's Maimai ID
   241→        discovered: Previously discovered selectors
   242→        content: Message content to send
   243→
   244→    Returns:
   245→        True if message sent successfully
   246→    """
   247→    try:
   248→        # Navigate to chat URL if pattern is available
   249→        if discovered.chat_url_pattern:
   250→            chat_url = discovered.chat_url_pattern.format(maimai_id=maimai_id)
   251→            await page.goto(chat_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   252→            await async_random_delay('page_load')
   253→
   254→        # Click chat button if needed
   255→        if not discovered.skip_chat_button and discovered.chat_button:
   256→            try:
   257→                await human_click(page, discovered.chat_button)
   258→                await async_random_delay('action')
   259→            except Exception as e:
   260→                logger.warning(f"Failed to click chat button: {e}")
   261→                return False
   262→
   263→        # Type message
   264→        if discovered.message_input:
   265→            try:
   266→                await page.wait_for_selector(discovered.message_input, timeout=10000)
   267→                await human_type(page, discovered.message_input, content)
   268→                await async_random_delay('action')
   269→            except Exception as e:
   270→                logger.warning(f"Failed to type message: {e}")
   271→                return False
   272→
   273→        # Click send
   274→        if discovered.send_button:
   275→            try:
   276→                await human_click(page, discovered.send_button)
   277→                await async_random_delay('action')
   278→
   279→                # Verify message was sent
   280→                from src.modules.message import _verify_message_sent
   281→                verified = await _verify_message_sent(page, content)
   282→                if not verified:
   283→                    logger.warning("Message send via discovered selectors could not be verified")
   284→                    return False
   285→                logger.debug("Message send via discovered selectors verified")
   286→                return True
   287→            except Exception as e:
   288→                logger.warning(f"Failed to click send: {e}")
   289→                return False
   290→
   291→        logger.warning("No send button selector available")
   292→        return False
   293→
   294→    except Exception as e:
   295→        logger.error(f"Error applying discovered selectors: {e}")
   296→        return False
   297→

1→"""Pipeline service for search-and-message orchestration.
     2→
     3→Extracted from CLI layer to separate business logic from argument parsing.
     4→Supports dual-path: search_center (Path A) and enterprise (Path B).
     5→"""
     6→
     7→from datetime import datetime
     8→from enum import Enum
     9→from pathlib import Path
    10→from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Set, Tuple
    11→
    12→from rich.console import Console
    13→from rich.table import Table
    14→
    15→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager
    16→from src.modules.search import search_candidates, search_candidates_enterprise, CandidateBasic
    17→
    18→console = Console()
    19→
    20→
    21→class SearchMode(str, Enum):
    22→    """Search mode for pipeline dispatch."""
    23→    SEARCH_CENTER = "search_center"
    24→    ENTERPRISE = "enterprise"
    25→
    26→
    27→def _candidates_to_dicts(candidates: List[CandidateBasic]) -> List[dict]:
    28→    """Convert CandidateBasic objects to dicts for message batch functions."""
    29→    return [
    30→        {
    31→            'maimai_id': c.maimai_id,
    32→            'name': c.name,
    33→            'company': c.company,
    34→            'title': c.title,
    35→            'profile_url': c.profile_url,
    36→        }
    37→        for c in candidates
    38→    ]
    39→
    40→
    41→async def search_all_keywords(
    42→    browser: BrowserManager,
    43→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
    44→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
    45→    location: Optional[str],
    46→    max_pages: int,
    47→    start_page: int = 1,
    48→) -> Tuple[List[CandidateBasic], Set[str]]:
    49→    """Iterate keywords, deduplicate, return combined results.
    50→
    51→    Args:
    52→        browser: BrowserManager instance
    53→        keywords: Keyword strings to search
    54→        company: Company filter strings
    55→        location: Location filter or None
    56→        max_pages: Pages per keyword
    57→        start_page: First page number
    58→
    59→    Returns:
    60→        (deduplicated candidates list, set of seen IDs)
    61→    """
    62→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
    63→    seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
    64→
    65→    for idx, kw in enumerate(keywords):
    66→        console.print(f"\n[bold blue][{idx+1}/{len(keywords)}] Searching: {kw}[/bold blue]")
    67→
    68→        candidates = await search_candidates(
    69→            keywords=kw,
    70→            company=company,
    71→            location=location,
    72→            pages=max_pages,
    73→            start_page=start_page,
    74→            browser=browser,
    75→        )
    76→
    77→        new_count = 0
    78→        for c in candidates:
    79→            if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids:
    80→                seen_ids.add(c.maimai_id)
    81→                all_candidates.append(c)
    82→                new_count += 1
    83→
    84→        console.print(f"  Found {len(candidates)} candidates, {new_count} new (deduplicated)")
    85→
    86→    return all_candidates, seen_ids
    87→
    88→
    89→async def search_all_keywords_enterprise(
    90→    browser: BrowserManager,
    91→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
    92→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
    93→    max_pages: int,
    94→    keep_last_tab_open: bool = False,
    95→) -> Tuple[List[CandidateBasic], Set[str]]:
    96→    """Iterate keywords via enterprise path, deduplicate, return combined results.
    97→
    98→    Args:
    99→        browser: BrowserManager instance
   100→        keywords: Keyword strings to search
   101→        company: Company filter strings
   102→        max_pages: Number of scroll-pages to extract per keyword
   103→        keep_last_tab_open: Keep the last enterprise tab open for inline messaging
   104→
   105→    Returns:
   106→        (deduplicated candidates list, set of seen IDs)
   107→    """
   108→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   109→    seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
   110→
   111→    for idx, kw in enumerate(keywords):
   112→        console.print(f"\n[bold blue][{idx+1}/{len(keywords)}] Enterprise search: {kw}[/bold blue]")
   113→
   114→        is_last = (idx == len(keywords) - 1)
   115→        candidates = await search_candidates_enterprise(
   116→            keywords=kw,
   117→            company=company,
   118→            pages=max_pages,
   119→            browser=browser,
   120→            keep_tab_open=keep_last_tab_open and is_last,
   121→        )
   122→
   123→        new_count = 0
   124→        for c in candidates:
   125→            if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids:
   126→                seen_ids.add(c.maimai_id)
   127→                all_candidates.append(c)
   128→                new_count += 1
   129→
   130→        console.print(f"  Found {len(candidates)} candidates, {new_count} new (deduplicated)")
   131→
   132→    return all_candidates, seen_ids
   133→

   209→def generate_pipeline_report(
   210→    candidates: List[CandidateBasic],
   211→    results: dict,
   212→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   213→    template: str,
   214→    mode: SearchMode,
   215→) -> str:
   216→    """Generate an Excel report for a pipeline run.
   217→
   218→    Args:
   219→        candidates: All candidates from search
   220→        results: Send results dict (total/sent/failed/skipped/rate_limited/details)
   221→        keywords: Search keywords used
   222→        template: Template name used
   223→        mode: Search mode (search_center or enterprise)
   224→
   225→    Returns:
   226→        Path to the generated report file
   227→    """
   228→    from openpyxl import Workbook
   229→    from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side
   230→    from loguru import logger
   231→
   232→    from src.utils.config import get_config
   233→    timestamp = datetime.now()
   234→    config = get_config()
   235→    report_dir = Path(config.get('data.report_dir', 'data/reports'))
   236→    report_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   237→    report_path = report_dir / f"pipeline_{timestamp.strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.xlsx"
   238→
   239→    wb = Workbook()
   240→
   241→    # --- Sheet 1: Overview ---
   242→    ws_overview = wb.active
   243→    ws_overview.title = "概览"
   244→
   245→    header_font = Font(bold=True, color="FFFFFF")
   246→    header_fill = PatternFill(start_color="4472C4", end_color="4472C4", fill_type="solid")
   247→    border = Border(
   248→        left=Side(style="thin"), right=Side(style="thin"),
   249→        top=Side(style="thin"), bottom=Side(style="thin"),
   250→    )
   251→
   252→    overview_rows = [
   253→        ("执行时间", timestamp.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")),
   254→        ("搜索关键词", ", ".join(keywords)),
   255→        ("消息模板", template),
   256→        ("搜索模式", mode.value),
   257→        ("搜索结果数", results["total"]),
   258→        ("发送总数", results["sent"] + results["failed"]),
   259→        ("成功", results["sent"]),
   260→        ("失败", results["failed"]),
   261→        ("跳过(已沟通)", results["skipped"]),
   262→        ("限流", results["rate_limited"]),
   263→    ]
   264→
   265→    for r_idx, (key, value) in enumerate(overview_rows, 1):
   266→        cell_key = ws_overview.cell(row=r_idx, column=1, value=key)
   267→        cell_val = ws_overview.cell(row=r_idx, column=2, value=value)
   268→        cell_key.font = Font(bold=True)
   269→        for cell in (cell_key, cell_val):
   270→            cell.border = border
   271→            cell.alignment = Alignment(vertical="center")
   272→
   273→    ws_overview.column_dimensions["A"].width = 18
   274→    ws_overview.column_dimensions["B"].width = 40
   275→
   276→    # --- Sheet 2: Candidate Details ---
   277→    ws_details = wb.create_sheet(title="候选人详情")
   278→
   279→    columns = ["序号", "姓名", "职位", "公司", "地区", "脉脉ID", "沟通状态", "失败原因"]
   280→    for c_idx, col_name in enumerate(columns, 1):
   281→        cell = ws_details.cell(row=1, column=c_idx, value=col_name)
   282→        cell.font = header_font
   283→        cell.fill = header_fill
   284→        cell.alignment = Alignment(horizontal="center", vertical="center")
   285→        cell.border = border
   286→
   287→    # Build a lookup from maimai_id -> detail
   288→    details_by_id: Dict[str, dict] = {}
   289→    for detail in results.get("details", []):
   290→        details_by_id[detail["maimai_id"]] = detail
   291→
   292→    status_map = {
   293→        "sent": "已发送",
   294→        "failed": "失败",
   295→        "skipped": "跳过",
   296→        "rate_limited": "限流",
   297→    }
   298→
   299→    for r_idx, c in enumerate(candidates, 1):
   300→        detail = details_by_id.get(c.maimai_id, {})
   301→        raw_status = detail.get("status", "not_attempted")
   302→        status_label = status_map.get(raw_status, "未处理")
   303→        reason = detail.get("reason", "")
   304→
   305→        row_data = [r_idx, c.name, c.title, c.company, c.location or "", c.maimai_id, status_label, reason]
   306→        for c_idx, value in enumerate(row_data, 1):
   307→            cell = ws_details.cell(row=r_idx + 1, column=c_idx, value=value)
   308→            cell.border = border
   309→            cell.alignment = Alignment(vertical="center", wrap_text=True)
   310→
   311→    detail_widths = {"A": 6, "B": 12, "C": 25, "D": 20, "E": 12, "F": 18, "G": 12, "H": 30}
   312→    for col, width in detail_widths.items():
   313→        ws_details.column_dimensions[col].width = width
   314→
   315→    ws_details.freeze_panes = "A2"
   316→    ws_details.auto_filter.ref = ws_details.dimensions
   317→
   318→    wb.save(str(report_path))
   319→    logger.info(f"Pipeline report saved to: {report_path}")
   320→    console.print(f"[green]Pipeline report saved to: {report_path}[/green]")
   321→    return str(report_path)
   322→
   323→
   324→def display_candidates_table(candidates: List[CandidateBasic], title: str) -> None:
   325→    """Display a Rich table of candidates."""
   326→    table = Table(title=f"{title} ({len(candidates)} candidates)")
   327→    table.add_column("#", style="dim", justify="right")
   328→    table.add_column("Name", style="cyan")
   329→    table.add_column("Title", style="green")
   330→    table.add_column("Company", style="yellow")
   331→    table.add_column("Location", style="blue")
   332→    has_scores = any(hasattr(c, '_score') for c in candidates[:1])
   333→    if has_scores:
   334→        table.add_column("Score", style="magenta", justify="right")
   335→    table.add_column("ID", style="dim")
   336→
   337→    for i, c in enumerate(candidates[:50], 1):
   338→        row = [str(i), c.name, c.title, c.company, c.location or '']
   339→        if has_scores:
   340→            row.append(str(getattr(c, '_score', '')))
   341→        row.append(c.maimai_id)
   342→        table.add_row(*row)
   343→
   344→    console.print(table)
   345→
   346→    if len(candidates) > 50:
   347→        console.print(f"[dim]... and {len(candidates) - 50} more[/dim]")
   348→
   349→
   350→def display_send_results(results: dict, title: str = "Send Results") -> None:
   351→    """Display send results summary table."""
   352→    console.print()
   353→    result_table = Table(title=title)
   354→    result_table.add_column("Metric", style="bold")
   355→    result_table.add_column("Count", justify="right")
   356→
   357→    result_table.add_row("Total candidates", str(results['total']))
   358→    result_table.add_row("Sent", f"[green]{results['sent']}[/green]")
   359→    result_table.add_row("Failed", f"[red]{results['failed']}[/red]")
   360→    result_table.add_row("Skipped (already messaged)", f"[yellow]{results['skipped']}[/yellow]")
   361→    result_table.add_row("Rate limited", f"[yellow]{results['rate_limited']}[/yellow]")
   362→
   363→    console.print(result_table)
   364→
