   366→async def run_pipeline_default(
   367→    browser: BrowserManager,
   368→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   369→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
   370→    location: Optional[str],
   371→    max_pages: int,
   372→    template: str,
   373→    variables: Dict[str, str],
   374→    dry_run: bool,
   375→    skip_messaged: bool,
   376→    interactive: bool = False,
   377→    mode: SearchMode = SearchMode.SEARCH_CENTER,
   378→) -> None:
   379→    """Pipeline: search all pages first, then send messages.
   380→
   381→    Saves a checkpoint after search completes so that message sending
   382→    can be resumed if interrupted.
   383→    """
   384→    from src.utils.checkpoint import CheckpointManager
   385→
   386→    checkpoint = CheckpointManager()
   387→
   388→    if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   389→        # Keep enterprise tab open for inline messaging (unless dry_run)
   390→        all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords_enterprise(
   391→            browser, keywords, company, max_pages,
   392→            keep_last_tab_open=not dry_run,
   393→        )
   394→    else:
   395→        all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords(
   396→            browser, keywords, company, location, max_pages,
   397→        )
   398→
   399→    if not all_candidates:
   400→        console.print("[yellow]No candidates found for any keyword.[/yellow]")
   401→        return
   402→
   403→    # Save checkpoint after search (batch_pages=0 marks non-batch mode)
   404→    _save_checkpoint(
   405→        checkpoint, keywords, template, variables, company, location,
   406→        max_pages, 0, skip_messaged, interactive,
   407→        max_pages, [], seen_ids, {'total': 0, 'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'rate_limited': 0},
   408→        mode=mode.value, dry_run=dry_run,
   409→    )
   410→
   411→    display_candidates_table(all_candidates, "Pipeline Results")
   412→
   413→    if dry_run:
   414→        console.print(f"\n[cyan][Dry Run] {len(all_candidates)} candidates found. No messages sent.[/cyan]")
   415→        checkpoint.delete()
   416→        return
   417→
   418→    if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   419→        results = await send_batch_enterprise(
   420→            all_candidates, template, variables, list(keywords), browser, skip_messaged,
   421→        )
   422→    else:
   423→        results = await send_batch(
   424→            all_candidates, template, variables, list(keywords), browser, skip_messaged, interactive,
   425→        )
   426→    display_send_results(results)
   427→    generate_pipeline_report(all_candidates, results, keywords, template, mode)
   428→
   429→    # Clean up checkpoint on successful completion
   430→    checkpoint.delete()
   431→    console.print("[dim]Checkpoint cleared (pipeline complete)[/dim]")
   432→
   433→
   434→async def run_pipeline_batched(
   435→    browser: BrowserManager,
   436→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   437→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
   438→    location: Optional[str],
   439→    max_pages: int,
   440→    batch_pages: int,
   441→    template: str,
   442→    variables: Dict[str, str],
   443→    dry_run: bool,
   444→    skip_messaged: bool,
   445→    interactive: bool = False,
   446→    resume_ckpt=None,
   447→    mode: SearchMode = SearchMode.SEARCH_CENTER,
   448→) -> None:
   449→    """Batched pipeline: search N pages, send messages, repeat."""
   450→    from src.modules.auth import ensure_logged_in, check_login_status
   451→    from src.core.session import get_session_manager
   452→    from src.utils.checkpoint import CheckpointManager
   453→
   454→    # Restore state from checkpoint or start fresh
   455→    if resume_ckpt:
   456→        # On resume, only treat sent_ids as truly "seen" (skip-worthy).
   457→        # Candidates that were found but not sent should be retried.
   458→        sent_ids = list(resume_ckpt.sent_ids)
   459→        seen_ids = set(sent_ids)  # only skip candidates already successfully sent
   460→        total_results = resume_ckpt.total_results or {
   461→            'total': 0, 'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'rate_limited': 0,
   462→        }
   463→        start_from_page = resume_ckpt.completed_pages + 1
   464→        console.print(f"[cyan]Resuming from page {start_from_page} (sent: {len(sent_ids)}, retrying unsent)[/cyan]")
   465→        checkpoint = resume_ckpt
   466→    else:
   467→        seen_ids = set()
   468→        sent_ids = []
   469→        total_results = {'total': 0, 'sent': 0, 'failed': 0, 'skipped': 0, 'rate_limited': 0}
   470→        start_from_page = 1
   471→        checkpoint = CheckpointManager()
   472→
   473→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   474→    all_details: List[dict] = []
   475→    batch_num = 0
   476→    consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   477→
   478→    batch_start = start_from_page
   479→    while batch_start <= max_pages:
   480→        batch_page_count = min(batch_pages, max_pages - batch_start + 1)
   481→        batch_num += 1
   482→        batch_end = batch_start + batch_page_count - 1
   483→
   484→        console.print(f"\n[bold magenta]━━━ Batch {batch_num}: Pages {batch_start}-{batch_end} ━━━[/bold magenta]")
   485→
   486→        if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   487→            batch_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords_enterprise(
   488→                browser, keywords, company, batch_page_count,
   489→                keep_last_tab_open=not dry_run,
   490→            )
   491→        else:
   492→            batch_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords(
   493→                browser, keywords, company, location, batch_page_count, start_page=batch_start,
   494→            )
   495→        # Filter out globally seen IDs
   496→        batch_candidates = [c for c in batch_candidates if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids]
   497→        seen_ids.update(c.maimai_id for c in batch_candidates)
   498→        all_candidates.extend(batch_candidates)
   499→
   500→        if not batch_candidates:
   501→            consecutive_empty_batches += 1
   502→            console.print(f"[yellow]No new candidates in batch {batch_num}.[/yellow]")
   503→
   504→            if consecutive_empty_batches >= 2:
   505→                console.print("[red]Multiple consecutive empty batches detected. Verifying login status...[/red]")
   506→                if not await check_login_status(browser.page):
   507→                    console.print("[red]Session expired! Clearing session and re-authenticating...[/red]")
   508→                    session_manager = get_session_manager()
   509→                    await session_manager.clear()
   510→                    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   511→                    consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   512→                    console.print("[green]Re-authenticated. Retrying current batch...[/green]")
   513→                    batch_num -= 1
   514→                    continue
   515→                else:
   516→                    console.print("[yellow]Session appears valid. Possibly no more results for these keywords.[/yellow]")
   517→
   518→            _save_checkpoint(
   519→                checkpoint, keywords, template, variables, company, location,
   520→                max_pages, batch_pages, skip_messaged, interactive,
   521→                batch_end, sent_ids, seen_ids, total_results,
   522→                mode=mode.value, dry_run=dry_run,
   523→            )
   524→            batch_start += batch_pages
   525→            continue
   526→        else:
   527→            consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   528→
   529→        display_candidates_table(batch_candidates, f"Batch {batch_num} Results")
   530→
   531→        if dry_run:
   532→            console.print(f"\n[cyan][Dry Run] Batch {batch_num}: {len(batch_candidates)} candidates found. No messages sent.[/cyan]")
   533→            _save_checkpoint(
   534→                checkpoint, keywords, template, variables, company, location,
   535→                max_pages, batch_pages, skip_messaged, interactive,
   536→                batch_end, sent_ids, seen_ids, total_results,
   537→                mode=mode.value, dry_run=dry_run,
   538→            )
   539→            batch_start += batch_pages
   540→            continue
   541→
   542→        if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   543→            results = await send_batch_enterprise(
   544→                batch_candidates, template, variables, list(keywords), browser, skip_messaged,
   545→            )
   546→        else:
   547→            results = await send_batch(
   548→                batch_candidates, template, variables, list(keywords), browser, skip_messaged, interactive,
   549→            )
   550→        display_send_results(results, title=f"Batch {batch_num} Send Results")
   551→
   552→        all_details.extend(results.get('details', []))
   553→        for detail in results.get('details', []):
   554→            if detail.get('status') == 'sent':
   555→                sent_ids.append(detail['maimai_id'])
   556→
   557→        for key in total_results:
   558→            total_results[key] += results[key]
   559→
   560→        _save_checkpoint(
   561→            checkpoint, keywords, template, variables, company, location,
   562→            max_pages, batch_pages, skip_messaged, interactive,
   563→            batch_end, sent_ids, seen_ids, total_results,
   564→            mode=mode.value, dry_run=dry_run,
   565→        )
   566→        console.print(f"[dim]Checkpoint saved (page {batch_end})[/dim]")
   567→
   568→        batch_start += batch_pages
   569→
   570→    # Final summary
   571→    console.print(f"\n[bold magenta]━━━ Pipeline Complete ━━━[/bold magenta]")
   572→    console.print(f"Total unique candidates found: {len(seen_ids)}")
   573→    if not dry_run and total_results['total'] > 0:
   574→        display_send_results(total_results, title="Overall Send Results")
   575→        total_results_with_details = {**total_results, 'details': all_details}
   576→        generate_pipeline_report(all_candidates, total_results_with_details, keywords, template, mode)
   577→
   578→    checkpoint.delete()
   579→    console.print("[dim]Checkpoint cleared (pipeline complete)[/dim]")
   580→
   581→
   582→def _save_checkpoint(
   583→    checkpoint, keywords, template, variables, company, location,
   584→    max_pages, batch_pages, skip_messaged, interactive,
   585→    completed_pages, sent_ids, seen_ids, total_results,
   586→    mode: str = "search_center",
   587→    dry_run: bool = False,
   588→) -> None:
   589→    """Save pipeline checkpoint (DRY helper)."""
   590→    checkpoint.save(
   591→        keywords=keywords, template=template, variables=variables,
   592→        company=company, location=location, max_pages=max_pages,
   593→        batch_pages=batch_pages, skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   594→        interactive=interactive, completed_pages=completed_pages,
   595→        sent_ids=sent_ids, seen_ids=list(seen_ids),
   596→        total_results=total_results, mode=mode, dry_run=dry_run,
   597→    )
   598→

1→"""Database models and setup using SQLAlchemy."""
     2→
     3→from contextlib import contextmanager
     4→from datetime import datetime, timezone
     5→from pathlib import Path
     6→from typing import Optional
     7→
     8→from sqlalchemy import (
     9→    Column, Integer, String, Text, DateTime, JSON,
    10→    ForeignKey, create_engine, Index, CheckConstraint
    11→)
    12→from sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base, sessionmaker, relationship
    13→from sqlalchemy.pool import StaticPool
    14→from loguru import logger
    15→
    16→from src.utils.config import get_config
    17→
    18→Base = declarative_base()
    19→
    20→
    21→def _utcnow():
    22→    """Return timezone-aware UTC now (replaces deprecated datetime.utcnow)."""
    23→    return datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    24→
    25→
    26→class Candidate(Base):
    27→    """Candidate model - stores candidate profile information."""
    28→
    29→    __tablename__ = 'candidates'
    30→
    31→    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    32→    maimai_id = Column(String(50), unique=True, nullable=False, index=True)
    33→    name = Column(String(100))
    34→    title = Column(String(200))
    35→    company = Column(String(200))
    36→    location = Column(String(100))

   109→
   110→class DatabaseManager:
   111→    """Database manager for initialization and session management."""
   112→
   113→    def __init__(self, db_path: Optional[str] = None):
   114→        """Initialize database manager."""
   115→        if db_path is None:
   116→            config = get_config()
   117→            db_path = config.get('data.database_path', 'data/maimai.db')
   118→
   119→        # Ensure data directory exists
   120→        db_file = Path(db_path)
   121→        db_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   122→
   123→        # Create engine and session
   124→        # StaticPool uses a single connection, avoiding SQLite "database is locked" errors
   125→        self.db_path = db_path
   126→        self.engine = create_engine(
   127→            f'sqlite:///{db_path}',
   128→            echo=False,
   129→            poolclass=StaticPool,
   130→            connect_args={"check_same_thread": False},
   131→        )
   132→        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
   133→
   134→        # Auto-create tables and run migrations
   135→        self.init_db()
   136→
   137→        logger.info(f"Database initialized at: {db_path}")
   138→
   139→    def init_db(self):
   140→        """Create all tables and run pending migrations."""
   141→        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
   142→        logger.info("Database tables created successfully")
   143→
   144→        from src.models.migrations import run_migrations
   145→        run_migrations(self.engine)
   146→
   147→    @contextmanager
   148→    def session_scope(self):
   149→        """Provide a transactional scope with auto commit/rollback/close."""
   150→        session = self.Session()
   151→        try:
   152→            yield session
   153→            session.commit()
   154→        except Exception:
   155→            session.rollback()
   156→            raise
   157→        finally:
   158→            session.close()
   159→
   160→    def drop_all(self):
   161→        """Drop all tables (use with caution!)."""
   162→        Base.metadata.drop_all(self.engine)
   163→        logger.warning("All database tables dropped")
   164→
   165→
   166→# Global database manager instance
   167→_db_manager = None
   168→
   169→
   170→def get_db_manager() -> DatabaseManager:
   171→    """Get global database manager instance."""
   172→    global _db_manager
   173→    if _db_manager is None:
   174→        _db_manager = DatabaseManager()
   175→    return _db_manager
   176→

1→"""Lightweight database migration system.
     2→
     3→Tracks schema versions in a dedicated table and applies incremental
     4→migrations on startup.  Each migration is a plain function that
     5→receives a SQLAlchemy connection.
     6→"""
     7→
     8→from typing import Callable, List, Tuple
     9→
    10→from sqlalchemy import text, inspect
    11→from loguru import logger
    12→
    13→
    14→# Migration registry: list of (version, description, migration_fn)
    15→# Append new migrations at the end; never reorder or remove existing entries.
    16→_migrations: List[Tuple[int, str, Callable]] = []
    17→
    18→
    19→def migration(version: int, description: str):
    20→    """Decorator to register a migration function."""
    21→    def decorator(fn: Callable):
    22→        _migrations.append((version, description, fn))
    23→        return fn
    24→    return decorator
    25→
    26→
    27→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    28→#  Built-in migrations
    29→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    30→
    31→@migration(1, "Initial schema — create core tables if missing")
    32→def _m001_initial_schema(conn):
    33→    """Ensure core tables exist (safe for existing databases)."""
    34→    # SQLAlchemy create_all is called before migrations, so tables should
    35→    # already exist.  This migration just marks the baseline version.
    36→    pass
    37→
    38→
    39→@migration(2, "Add retry_count column to messages table")
    40→def _m002_messages_retry_count(conn):
    41→    inspector = inspect(conn)
    42→    columns = [c["name"] for c in inspector.get_columns("messages")]
    43→    if "retry_count" not in columns:
    44→        conn.execute(text("ALTER TABLE messages ADD COLUMN retry_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0"))
    45→
    46→
    47→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    48→#  Migration runner
    49→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    50→
    51→def _ensure_version_table(conn) -> None:
    52→    """Create the schema_version table if it doesn't exist."""
    53→    conn.execute(text("""
    54→        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_version (
    55→            version INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    56→            description TEXT NOT NULL,
    57→            applied_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    58→        )
    59→    """))
    60→    conn.commit()
    61→
    62→
    63→def _current_version(conn) -> int:
    64→    """Return highest applied migration version, or 0 if none."""
    65→    result = conn.execute(text("SELECT MAX(version) FROM schema_version"))
    66→    row = result.fetchone()
    67→    return row[0] or 0 if row else 0
    68→
    69→
    70→def run_migrations(engine) -> None:
    71→    """Apply all pending migrations against *engine*.
    72→
    73→    Called automatically by DatabaseManager.init_db().
    74→    """
    75→    with engine.connect() as conn:
    76→        _ensure_version_table(conn)
    77→        current = _current_version(conn)
    78→
    79→        pending = [(v, d, fn) for v, d, fn in _migrations if v > current]
    80→        if not pending:
    81→            logger.debug(f"Database schema is up-to-date (version {current})")
    82→            return
    83→
    84→        for version, description, fn in sorted(pending):
    85→            logger.info(f"Applying migration v{version}: {description}")
    86→            fn(conn)
    87→            conn.execute(
    88→                text("INSERT INTO schema_version (version, description) VALUES (:v, :d)"),
    89→                {"v": version, "d": description},
    90→            )
    91→            conn.commit()
    92→
    93→        final = _current_version(conn)
    94→        logger.info(f"Migrations complete — schema version {final}")
    95→

1→"""Export module for exporting candidate data.
     2→
     3→Supports Excel (.xlsx) and CSV formats with optional
     4→message history inclusion.
     5→"""
     6→
     7→from datetime import datetime
     8→from pathlib import Path
     9→from typing import Optional, Literal, List, Dict, Any
    10→
    11→import pandas as pd
    12→from openpyxl import Workbook
    13→from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side
    14→from openpyxl.utils.dataframe import dataframe_to_rows
    15→from loguru import logger
    16→from rich.console import Console
    17→
    18→from src.utils.config import get_config
    19→from src.models.database import Candidate, Message, get_db_manager
    20→
    21→console = Console()
    22→
    23→
    24→def export_candidates(
    25→    format: Literal["excel", "xlsx", "csv"] = "excel",
    26→    output_path: Optional[str] = None,
    27→    include_messages: bool = True
    28→) -> str:
    29→    """
    30→    Export candidate data to Excel or CSV.
    31→
    32→    Args:
    33→        format: Export format ('excel', 'xlsx', or 'csv')
    34→        output_path: Output file path (auto-generated if None)
    35→        include_messages: Include message history
    36→
    37→    Returns:
    38→        Path to exported file
    39→    """
    40→    config = get_config()
    41→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
    42→
    43→    # Normalize format
    44→    if format == "xlsx":
    45→        format = "excel"
    46→
    47→    # Generate output path if not provided
    48→    if output_path is None:
    49→        export_dir = Path(config.get('data.export_dir', 'data/exports'))
    50→        export_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    51→
    52→        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
    53→        extension = 'xlsx' if format == 'excel' else 'csv'
    54→        output_path = str(export_dir / f"candidates_{timestamp}.{extension}")
    55→
    56→    # Ensure parent directory exists
    57→    Path(output_path).parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    58→
    59→    # Get data from database
    60→    candidates_data = _get_candidates_data(db_manager, include_messages)
    61→
    62→    if not candidates_data:
    63→        console.print("[yellow]No candidates to export[/yellow]")
    64→        return ""
    65→
    66→    # Create DataFrame
    67→    df = _create_dataframe(candidates_data)
    68→
    69→    # Export based on format
    70→    if format == "excel":
    71→        _export_to_excel(df, output_path)
    72→    else:
    73→        _export_to_csv(df, output_path)
    74→
    75→    console.print(f"[green]Exported {len(candidates_data)} candidates to: {output_path}[/green]")
    76→    return output_path
    77→
    78→
    79→def _get_candidates_data(db_manager, include_messages: bool) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
    80→    """
    81→    Get candidate data from database.
    82→
    83→    Args:
    84→        db_manager: Database manager instance
    85→        include_messages: Whether to include message history
    86→
    87→    Returns:
    88→        List of candidate dictionaries
    89→    """
    90→    with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
    91→        candidates = session.query(Candidate).all()
    92→
    93→        # Batch pre-fetch all messages grouped by candidate to avoid N+1 queries
    94→        messages_by_candidate = {}
    95→        if include_messages and candidates:
    96→            all_maimai_ids = [c.maimai_id for c in candidates]
    97→            all_messages = session.query(Message).filter(
    98→                Message.candidate_maimai_id.in_(all_maimai_ids)
    99→            ).order_by(Message.created_at.desc()).all()
   100→
   101→            for msg in all_messages:
   102→                messages_by_candidate.setdefault(msg.candidate_maimai_id, []).append(msg)
   103→
   104→        data = []
   105→        for candidate in candidates:
   106→            record = {
   107→                'maimai_id': candidate.maimai_id,
   108→                'name': candidate.name,
   109→                'title': candidate.title,
   110→                'company': candidate.company,
   111→                'location': candidate.location,
   112→                'profile_url': candidate.profile_url,
   113→                'first_seen': candidate.first_seen,
   114→                'last_updated': candidate.last_updated,
   115→                'source_search': candidate.source_search,
   116→            }
   117→
   118→            # Flatten education
   119→            education = candidate.education or []
   120→            if education:
   121→                latest_edu = education[0]
   122→                record['latest_education'] = _format_education(latest_edu)
   123→            else:
   124→                record['latest_education'] = ''
   125→
   126→            # Flatten work experience
   127→            work_exp = candidate.work_experience or []
   128→            if work_exp:
   129→                latest_work = work_exp[0]
   130→                record['latest_experience'] = _format_work_experience(latest_work)
   131→            else:
   132→                record['latest_experience'] = ''
   133→
   134→            # Format skills
   135→            skills = candidate.skills or []
   136→            record['skills'] = ', '.join(skills) if skills else ''
   137→
   138→            # Get message info from pre-fetched data
   139→            if include_messages:
   140→                messages = messages_by_candidate.get(candidate.maimai_id, [])
   141→                record['message_count'] = len(messages)
   142→
   143→                if messages:
   144→                    latest_msg = messages[0]
   145→                    record['last_message_status'] = latest_msg.status
   146→                    record['last_message_date'] = latest_msg.sent_at or latest_msg.created_at
   147→                    record['last_message_template'] = latest_msg.template_name
   148→                else:
   149→                    record['last_message_status'] = ''
   150→                    record['last_message_date'] = None
   151→                    record['last_message_template'] = ''
   152→
   153→            data.append(record)
   154→
   155→        return data
   156→
   157→
   158→def _format_education(edu: Dict) -> str:
   159→    """Format education entry as string."""
   160→    parts = []
   161→    if edu.get('school'):
   162→        parts.append(edu['school'])
   163→    if edu.get('degree'):
   164→        parts.append(edu['degree'])
   165→    if edu.get('major'):
   166→        parts.append(edu['major'])
   167→    return ' - '.join(parts) if parts else ''
   168→
   169→
   170→def _format_work_experience(work: Dict) -> str:
   171→    """Format work experience entry as string."""
   172→    parts = []
   173→    if work.get('title'):
   174→        parts.append(work['title'])
   175→    if work.get('company'):
   176→        parts.append(f"@ {work['company']}")
   177→    return ' '.join(parts) if parts else ''
   178→
   179→
   180→def _create_dataframe(data: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> pd.DataFrame:
   181→    """
   182→    Create pandas DataFrame from candidate data.
   183→
   184→    Args:
   185→        data: List of candidate dictionaries
   186→
   187→    Returns:
   188→        pandas DataFrame
   189→    """
   190→    # Define column order
   191→    columns = [
   192→        'maimai_id',
   193→        'name',
   194→        'title',
   195→        'company',
   196→        'location',
   197→        'latest_education',
   198→        'latest_experience',
   199→        'skills',
   200→        'profile_url',
   201→        'source_search',
   202→        'first_seen',
   203→        'last_updated',
   204→    ]
   205→
   206→    # Add message columns if present
   207→    if data and 'message_count' in data[0]:
   208→        columns.extend([
   209→            'message_count',
   210→            'last_message_status',
   211→            'last_message_date',
   212→            'last_message_template',
   213→        ])
   214→
   215→    # Create DataFrame
   216→    df = pd.DataFrame(data)
   217→
   218→    # Reorder columns (only include existing columns)
   219→    existing_columns = [c for c in columns if c in df.columns]
   220→    df = df[existing_columns]
   221→
   222→    # Format datetime columns
   223→    datetime_columns = ['first_seen', 'last_updated', 'last_message_date']
   224→    for col in datetime_columns:
   225→        if col in df.columns:
   226→            df[col] = pd.to_datetime(df[col]).dt.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')
   227→
   228→    return df
   229→
   230→
   231→def _export_to_excel(df: pd.DataFrame, output_path: str) -> None:
   232→    """
   233→    Export DataFrame to Excel with formatting.
   234→
   235→    Args:
   236→        df: pandas DataFrame
   237→        output_path: Output file path
   238→    """
   239→    # Create workbook
   240→    wb = Workbook()
   241→    ws = wb.active
   242→    ws.title = "Candidates"
   243→
   244→    # Define styles
   245→    header_font = Font(bold=True, color="FFFFFF")
   246→    header_fill = PatternFill(start_color="4472C4", end_color="4472C4", fill_type="solid")
   247→    header_alignment = Alignment(horizontal="center", vertical="center", wrap_text=True)
   248→
   249→    border = Border(
   250→        left=Side(style='thin'),
   251→        right=Side(style='thin'),
   252→        top=Side(style='thin'),
   253→        bottom=Side(style='thin')
   254→    )
   255→
   256→    # Write data
   257→    for r_idx, row in enumerate(dataframe_to_rows(df, index=False, header=True), 1):
   258→        for c_idx, value in enumerate(row, 1):
   259→            cell = ws.cell(row=r_idx, column=c_idx, value=value)
   260→            cell.border = border
   261→
   262→            if r_idx == 1:
   263→                # Header row
   264→                cell.font = header_font
   265→                cell.fill = header_fill
   266→                cell.alignment = header_alignment
   267→            else:
   268→                # Data rows
   269→                cell.alignment = Alignment(vertical="center", wrap_text=True)
   270→
   271→    # Set column widths
   272→    column_widths = {
   273→        'A': 15,  # maimai_id
   274→        'B': 12,  # name
   275→        'C': 25,  # title
   276→        'D': 20,  # company
   277→        'E': 12,  # location
   278→        'F': 30,  # latest_education
   279→        'G': 30,  # latest_experience
   280→        'H': 40,  # skills
   281→        'I': 40,  # profile_url
   282→        'J': 20,  # source_search
   283→        'K': 18,  # first_seen
   284→        'L': 18,  # last_updated
   285→        'M': 12,  # message_count
   286→        'N': 15,  # last_message_status
   287→        'O': 18,  # last_message_date
   288→        'P': 15,  # last_message_template
   289→    }
   290→
   291→    for col, width in column_widths.items():
   292→        ws.column_dimensions[col].width = width
   293→
   294→    # Freeze first row
   295→    ws.freeze_panes = 'A2'
   296→
   297→    # Add auto-filter
   298→    ws.auto_filter.ref = ws.dimensions
   299→
   300→    # Save workbook
   301→    wb.save(output_path)
   302→    logger.info(f"Excel file saved to: {output_path}")
   303→
   304→
   305→def _export_to_csv(df: pd.DataFrame, output_path: str) -> None:
   306→    """
   307→    Export DataFrame to CSV.
   308→
   309→    Args:
   310→        df: pandas DataFrame
   311→        output_path: Output file path
   312→    """
   313→    df.to_csv(output_path, index=False, encoding='utf-8-sig')
   314→    logger.info(f"CSV file saved to: {output_path}")
   315→

1→"""Message module for sending messages to candidates.

     5→"""
     6→

     9→import traceback
    10→from datetime import datetime, timezone
    11→from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional
    12→
    13→import questionary
    14→from patchright.async_api import Page
    15→from loguru import logger
    16→from rich.console import Console
    17→from rich.panel import Panel
    18→from rich.text import Text
    19→
    20→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    21→from src.core.anti_detection import human_type, human_click
    22→from src.modules.auth import ensure_logged_in
    23→from src.utils.config import get_config
    24→from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    25→from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    26→from src.utils.retry import retry_navigation

    28→from src.models.database import Candidate, Message, get_db_manager
    29→from src.exceptions.errors import (

    35→console = Console()

    37→# Maimai chat URL - navigate directly to chat page
    38→MAIMAI_CHAT_URL = "https://maimai.cn/bizmember/uh_chat_pc?u2={user_id}&from=pc_web_search&fr=profile"
    39→
    40→
    41→def _extract_user_id(profile_url: str) -> Optional[str]:
    42→    """Extract dstu/user_id from a Maimai profile URL for direct chat navigation.
    43→
    44→    Only returns IDs that are known to work with the chat URL (u2= parameter).
    45→    Query-param IDs (dstu, u2, egid) are reliable for chat navigation.
    46→    Path-based IDs (/contact/detail/xxx) are NOT the same as chat user IDs
    47→    and should not be used for direct chat URL construction.
    48→    """
    49→    from urllib.parse import urlparse, parse_qs
    50→    parsed = urlparse(profile_url)
    51→    params = parse_qs(parsed.query)
    52→    # Only use query parameter IDs — these are confirmed to work with uh_chat_pc
    53→    for key in ('dstu', 'u2', 'egid'):
    54→        if key in params:
    55→            return params[key][0]
    56→    return None
    57→
    58→
    59→async def _navigate_to_chat(
    60→    page: Page,
    61→    profile_url: Optional[str],
    62→    config,
    63→    browser: BrowserManager,
    64→    maimai_id: str,
    65→    interactive: bool = False,
    66→    discovered_selectors=None,
    67→) -> bool:
    68→    """Navigate to the chat page for a candidate.
    69→
    70→    Tries in order:
    71→    1. Extract user_id from profile_url query params → direct chat URL
    72→    2. Navigate to profile_url, extract user_id from redirected URL → direct chat URL
    73→    3. Click chat button on profile page as fallback
    74→
    75→    If no profile_url is provided, looks up the candidate's profile_url from DB.
    76→
    77→    Args:
    78→        page: Playwright page instance
    79→        profile_url: Candidate's profile URL (may be None)
    80→        config: Config instance
    81→        browser: Browser manager instance
    82→        maimai_id: Candidate's Maimai ID
    83→        interactive: Enable interactive selector discovery
    84→        discovered_selectors: Shared DiscoveredSelectors instance
    85→
    86→    Returns:
    87→        True if successfully navigated to chat page
    88→    """
    89→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
    90→
    91→    # Resolve profile URL from DB if not provided
    92→    if not profile_url:
    93→        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
    94→            db_candidate = session.query(Candidate).filter_by(maimai_id=maimai_id).first()
    95→            profile_url = db_candidate.profile_url if db_candidate else None
    96→
    97→        if not profile_url:
    98→            raise PermanentFailureError(f"No profile URL for {maimai_id}")
    99→
   100→    # Try extracting user_id directly from profile URL
   101→    user_id = _extract_user_id(profile_url)
   102→    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: profile_url={profile_url!r}, extracted user_id={user_id}")
   103→
   104→    if user_id:
   105→        chat_url = MAIMAI_CHAT_URL.format(user_id=user_id)
   106→        await retry_navigation(page, chat_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   107→        await async_random_delay('page_load')
   108→        return True
   109→
   110→    # Navigate to profile page, then try to extract user_id from resulting URL
   111→    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: navigating to profile {profile_url}")
   112→    await retry_navigation(page, profile_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   113→    await async_random_delay('page_load')
   114→
   115→    current_url = page.url
   116→    logger.debug(f"_navigate_to_chat: landed on {current_url}")
   117→    redirected_user_id = _extract_user_id(current_url)
   118→    if redirected_user_id:
   119→        logger.info(f"Extracted user_id={redirected_user_id} from page URL, redirecting to chat")
   120→        chat_url = MAIMAI_CHAT_URL.format(user_id=redirected_user_id)
   121→        await retry_navigation(page, chat_url, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   122→        await async_random_delay('page_load')
   123→        return True
   124→
   125→    # Fallback: click chat button on profile page
   126→    chat_button_found = await _click_chat_button(page, config)
   127→    if chat_button_found:
   128→        await async_random_delay('action')
   129→        return True
   130→
   131→    # If interactive mode, trigger selector discovery
   132→    if interactive and discovered_selectors is not None and not discovered_selectors.is_populated:
   133→        from src.modules.selector_discovery import discover_chat_page
   134→        console.print("[yellow]Chat button not found. Entering interactive discovery mode...[/yellow]")
   135→        result = await discover_chat_page(page, maimai_id, browser)
   136→        if result.is_populated:
   137→            discovered_selectors.chat_button = result.chat_button
   138→            discovered_selectors.message_input = result.message_input
   139→            discovered_selectors.send_button = result.send_button
   140→            discovered_selectors.chat_url_pattern = result.chat_url_pattern
   141→            discovered_selectors.skip_chat_button = result.skip_chat_button
   142→            discovered_selectors.is_populated = True
   143→            return True
   144→
   145→    console.print("[red]Could not find chat button[/red]")
   146→    await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_{maimai_id}")
   147→    return False
   148→

   150→async def _handle_quick_contact(page: Page, content: str) -> Optional[bool]:
   151→    """Handle Maimai's "极速联系" (Quick Contact) page.
   152→
   153→    This page appears instead of regular chat for some candidates. It has a
   154→    category selector, a textarea, and a "提交" (Submit) button.
   155→
   156→    Args:
   157→        page: Playwright page instance
   158→        content: Message content to send
   159→
   160→    Returns:
   161→        True if message was sent via quick contact form,
   162→        False if quick contact page was detected but sending failed,
   163→        None if this is not a quick contact page (caller should continue normal flow)
   164→    """
   165→    try:
   166→        # Detect quick contact page via page title or page content
   167→        is_quick_contact = await page.evaluate('''() => {
   168→            const title = document.title || '';
   169→            const bodyText = document.body ? document.body.innerText : '';
   170→            return title.includes('极速联系') || bodyText.includes('极速联系');
   171→        }''')
   172→
   173→        if not is_quick_contact:
   174→            return None
   175→
   176→        logger.info("Detected '极速联系' (Quick Contact) page")
   177→
   178→        # Select "招聘类" category if present
   179→        try:
   180→            recruit_btn = await page.wait_for_selector(
   181→                'text=招聘类', timeout=3000
   182→            )
   183→            if recruit_btn:
   184→                await human_click(page, 'text=招聘类')
   185→                await async_random_delay('action')
   186→                logger.debug("Selected '招聘类' category")
   187→        except Exception:
   188→            logger.debug("'招聘类' category button not found, continuing")
   189→
   190→        # Find textarea and fill with message content using Playwright native fill
   191→        try:
   192→            textarea = await page.wait_for_selector('textarea', timeout=5000)
   193→            if not textarea:
   194→                logger.warning("Quick contact: textarea not found")
   195→                return False
   196→        except Exception:
   197→            logger.warning("Quick contact: textarea not found (timeout)")
   198→            return False
   199→
   200→        # Clear and fill using Playwright's native API (avoids Emunium issues)
   201→        await textarea.click()
   202→        await textarea.fill('')
   203→        await textarea.fill(content)
   204→        await async_random_delay('action')
   205→        logger.debug("Filled quick contact textarea")
   206→
   207→        # Click "提交" (Submit) button — race all selectors in parallel via JS,
   208→        # then click the first visible match. Retries up to 2 times.
   209→        submit_selectors = [
   210→            'button:has-text("提交")',
   211→            ':has-text("提交"):not(body):not(div:has(div:has-text("提交")))',
   212→            'text=提交',
   213→            '[class*="submit"]',
   214→            '[class*="btn"]:has-text("提交")',
   215→            'a:has-text("提交")',
   216→            'div:has-text("提交"):not(:has(div:has-text("提交")))',
   217→        ]
   218→
   219→        max_submit_retries = 2
   220→        for submit_attempt in range(1 + max_submit_retries):
   221→            submit_btn = None
   222→            matched_selector = None
   223→
   224→            # Try selectors sequentially (Playwright page is not safe for concurrent ops)
   225→            for sel in submit_selectors:
   226→                try:
   227→                    elem = await page.wait_for_selector(sel, timeout=1500)
   228→                    if elem and await elem.is_visible():
   229→                        submit_btn = elem
   230→                        matched_selector = sel
   231→                        break
   232→                except Exception:
   233→                    continue
   234→
   235→            if submit_btn and matched_selector:
   236→                logger.debug(f"Quick contact: found submit button with selector: {matched_selector}")
   237→                break
   238→
   239→            if submit_attempt < max_submit_retries:
   240→                logger.debug(f"Quick contact: submit button not found, retry {submit_attempt + 1}")
   241→                await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
   242→
   243→        if not submit_btn or not matched_selector:
   244→            logger.warning("Quick contact: submit button not found with any selector after retries")
   245→            return False
   246→
   247→        try:
   248→            await submit_btn.click()
   249→        except Exception:
   250→            try:
   251→                await human_click(page, matched_selector)
   252→            except Exception as click_err:
   253→                logger.warning(f"Quick contact: both click methods failed: {click_err}")
   254→                return False
   255→        await async_random_delay('action')
   256→        logger.info("Quick contact: submitted message")
   257→        return True
   258→
   259→    except Exception as e:
   260→        logger.error(f"Quick contact handling failed: {e}\n{traceback.format_exc()}")
   261→        return False
   262→
   263→
   264→async def _detect_vip_paywall(page: Page) -> bool:
   265→    """Detect if a VIP/membership paywall is blocking the current page.
   266→
   267→    Non-VIP accounts may be redirected to a recharge/upgrade page when
   268→    trying to message certain candidates. This checks the page URL and
   269→    visible text for common paywall indicators.
   270→
   271→    Args:
   272→        page: Playwright page instance
   273→
   274→    Returns:
   275→        True if a VIP paywall is detected
   276→    """
   277→    try:
   278→        return await page.evaluate('''() => {
   279→            const url = window.location.href;
   280→            const urlKeywords = ['vip', 'member', 'pay', 'recharge', 'upgrade', 'subscribe'];
   281→            if (urlKeywords.some(kw => url.toLowerCase().includes(kw))) {
   282→                return true;
   283→            }
   284→
   285→            const title = document.title || '';
   286→            const bodyText = document.body ? document.body.innerText.substring(0, 3000) : '';
   287→            const text = title + ' ' + bodyText;
   288→
   289→            const paywallPatterns = [
   290→                '开通会员', '升级会员', '会员专享', '会员权益',
   291→                '充值', '付费', '购买会员', '开通VIP', '升级VIP',
   292→                '立即开通', '立即升级', '立即购买',
   293→                '会员到期', '续费', '解锁', '次数已用完',
   294→                '今日沟通次数', '沟通人数已达上限',
   295→            ];
   296→
   297→            return paywallPatterns.some(p => text.includes(p));
   298→        }''')
   299→    except Exception as e:
   300→        logger.debug(f"VIP paywall detection failed: {e}")
   301→        return False
   302→

   304→async def send_message(
   305→    maimai_id: str,
   306→    template_name: str,
   307→    variables: Dict[str, str],
   308→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   309→    skip_confirmation: bool = False,
   310→    interactive: bool = False,
   311→    discovered_selectors: Optional['DiscoveredSelectors'] = None,
   312→    _skip_rate_check: bool = False,
   313→    profile_url: Optional[str] = None,
   314→) -> bool:
   315→    """
   316→    Send a message to a candidate.
   317→
   318→    Args:
   319→        maimai_id: Candidate's Maimai ID
   320→        template_name: Name of message template to use
   321→        variables: Variables to substitute in template
   322→        browser: Browser manager instance
   323→        skip_confirmation: Skip confirmation (only for testing)
   324→        interactive: Enable interactive selector discovery on failure
   325→        discovered_selectors: Shared DiscoveredSelectors instance for reuse
   326→
   327→    Returns:
   328→        True if message was sent successfully
   329→
   330→    Raises:
   331→        RateLimitExceededError: If rate limit exceeded
   332→        ValidationError: If template or variables invalid
   333→    """
   334→    # Validate and clean inputs
   335→    maimai_id = validate_maimai_id(maimai_id)
   336→
   337→    if browser is None:
   338→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   339→
   340→    config = get_config()
   341→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   342→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   343→
   344→    # Get template
   345→    try:
   346→        template = config.get_template(template_name)
   347→    except Exception as e:
   348→        raise ValidationError(f"Template not found: {template_name}")
   349→
   350→    # Validate template variables
   351→    validate_template_variables(template, variables)
   352→
   353→    # Render message content
   354→    content = render_template(template['content'], variables)
   355→
   356→    # Get candidate info for display
   357→    candidate_info = _get_candidate_info(db_manager, maimai_id)
   358→
   359→    # Preview and confirm
   360→    if not skip_confirmation:
   361→        action = await interactive_confirm(content, candidate_info, template_name)
   362→
   363→        if action == 'skip':
   364→            console.print("[yellow]Message skipped[/yellow]")
   365→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'cancelled')
   366→            return False
   367→
   368→        elif action == 'edit':
   369→            # Allow user to edit content
   370→            content = await edit_message(content)
   371→            if content is None:
   372→                console.print("[yellow]Message cancelled[/yellow]")
   373→                return False
   374→
   375→            # Re-confirm after edit
   376→            action = await interactive_confirm(content, candidate_info, template_name)
   377→            if action != 'send':
   378→                console.print("[yellow]Message skipped[/yellow]")
   379→                return False
   380→
   381→        elif action != 'send':
   382→            console.print("[yellow]Message cancelled[/yellow]")
   383→            return False
   384→
   385→    # Check rate limit (waits through min-interval) - skip when called from batch
   386→    if not _skip_rate_check:
   387→        await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
   388→
   389→    # Ensure logged in
   390→    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   391→
   392→    try:
   393→        page = browser.page
   394→
   395→        # If we have populated discovered selectors, use them directly
   396→        if discovered_selectors and discovered_selectors.is_populated:
   397→            from src.modules.selector_discovery import apply_discovered_selectors
   398→            success = await apply_discovered_selectors(
   399→                page, maimai_id, discovered_selectors, content
   400→            )
   401→            if success:
   402→                rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {
   403→                    'maimai_id': maimai_id,
   404→                    'template': template_name
   405→                })
   406→                _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'sent')
   407→                console.print("[green]Message sent successfully![/green]")
   408→                return True
   409→            else:
   410→                console.print("[red]Failed to send with discovered selectors[/red]")
   411→                await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_{maimai_id}")
   412→                _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'failed')
   413→                return False
   414→
   415→        nav_ok = await _navigate_to_chat(
   416→            page, profile_url, config, browser, maimai_id,
   417→            interactive, discovered_selectors,
   418→        )
   419→        if not nav_ok:
   420→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'failed')
   421→            return False
   422→
   423→        # Check for "等待回应" (Awaiting Response) — already messaged this candidate
   424→        try:
   425→            awaiting = await page.evaluate('''() => {
   426→                const text = document.body ? document.body.innerText : '';
   427→                return text.includes('等待回应') || text.includes('等待对方回复');
   428→            }''')
   429→            if awaiting:
   430→                logger.info(f"Candidate {maimai_id} already messaged (awaiting response), skipping")
   431→                console.print(f"[yellow]Already messaged {maimai_id} (等待回应), skipping[/yellow]")
   432→                _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'cancelled')
   433→                return False
   434→        except Exception as e:
   435→            logger.debug(f"Awaiting-response check failed for {maimai_id}: {e}")
   436→
   437→        # Check for "极速联系" (Quick Contact) page
   438→        qc_result = await _handle_quick_contact(page, content)
   439→        if qc_result is True:
   440→            rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {
   441→                'maimai_id': maimai_id,
   442→                'template': template_name,
   443→                'mode': 'quick_contact',
   444→            })
   445→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'sent')
   446→            console.print("[green]Message sent via Quick Contact![/green]")
   447→            return True
   448→        elif qc_result is False:
   449→            console.print("[red]Quick Contact page detected but send failed[/red]")
   450→            await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_qc_{maimai_id}")
   451→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'failed')
   452→            return False
   453→        # qc_result is None → not a quick contact page, continue normal flow
   454→
   455→        # If interactive discovery succeeded, apply discovered selectors
   456→        if discovered_selectors and discovered_selectors.is_populated:
   457→            from src.modules.selector_discovery import apply_discovered_selectors
   458→            success = await apply_discovered_selectors(
   459→                page, maimai_id, discovered_selectors, content
   460→            )
   461→            if success:
   462→                rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {
   463→                    'maimai_id': maimai_id,
   464→                    'template': template_name
   465→                })
   466→                _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'sent')
   467→                console.print("[green]Message sent successfully![/green]")
   468→                return True
   469→
   470→        # Check for existing conversation to avoid duplicate greetings
   471→        has_existing = await _check_existing_conversation(page, maimai_id)
   472→        if has_existing:
   473→            console.print(f"[yellow]Existing conversation detected with {maimai_id}. Skipping to avoid duplicate.[/yellow]")
   474→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'cancelled')
   475→            return False
   476→
   477→        # Find message input and type message
   478→        input_found = await _type_message(page, config, content)
   479→        if not input_found:
   480→            console.print("[red]Could not find message input[/red]")
   481→            await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_{maimai_id}")
   482→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'failed')
   483→            return False
   484→
   485→        await async_random_delay('action')
   486→
   487→        # Click send button
   488→        sent = await _click_send_button(page, config)
   489→        if not sent:
   490→            console.print("[red]Could not send message[/red]")
   491→            await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_{maimai_id}")
   492→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'failed')
   493→            return False
   494→
   495→        # Check if clicking send triggered a VIP paywall popup
   496→        await asyncio.sleep(1)
   497→        if await _detect_vip_paywall(page):
   498→            console.print(f"[yellow]VIP paywall popup appeared after send for {maimai_id}, skipping[/yellow]")
   499→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'cancelled')
   500→            raise PermanentFailureError(f"VIP paywall detected for {maimai_id}")
   501→
   502→        # Verify message was actually sent
   503→        verified = await _verify_message_sent(page, content)
   504→        if not verified:
   505→            logger.warning(f"Message to {maimai_id}: send button clicked but could not verify delivery")
   506→            console.print("[yellow]Warning: Message send could not be verified. Marking as unverified.[/yellow]")
   507→            await browser.screenshot(f"message_unverified_{maimai_id}")
   508→            # Still log as sent but with unverified note in details
   509→            rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {
   510→                'maimai_id': maimai_id,
   511→                'template': template_name,
   512→                'verified': False,
   513→            })
   514→            _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'sent')
   515→            console.print("[yellow]Message marked as sent (unverified)[/yellow]")
   516→            return True
   517→
   518→        # Log action
   519→        rate_limiter.log_action('send_message', {
   520→            'maimai_id': maimai_id,
   521→            'template': template_name,
   522→            'verified': True,
   523→        })
   524→
   525→        # Log message to database
   526→        _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'sent')
   527→
   528→        console.print("[green]Message sent and verified![/green]")
   529→        return True
   530→
   531→    except PermanentFailureError:
   532→        raise
   533→    except Exception as e:
   534→        logger.error(f"Error sending message: {e}")
   535→        await browser.screenshot(f"message_error_{maimai_id}")
   536→        _log_message(db_manager, maimai_id, template_name, content, 'failed')
   537→        raise
   538→

   540→async def send_message_batch(
   541→    candidates: List[dict],
   542→    template_name: str,
   543→    common_variables: Dict[str, str],
   544→    browser: BrowserManager,
   545→    skip_messaged: bool = True,
   546→    interactive: bool = False,
   547→) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   548→    """
   549→    Batch send messages to a list of candidates.
   550→
   551→    Flow:
   552→    1. Filter already-messaged candidates
   553→    2. Auto-fill name/company/position variables per candidate
   554→    3. Render message template
   555→    4. Show candidate list + first message preview
   556→    5. Single confirmation
   557→    6. Send one by one, checking rate limit each time
   558→    7. Skip failures and record
   559→    8. Return result stats
   560→
   561→    Args:
   562→        candidates: List of dicts with maimai_id, name, company, title
   563→        template_name: Name of message template
   564→        common_variables: Shared variables (recruiter_name, target_position, etc.)
   565→        browser: Browser manager instance
   566→        skip_messaged: Skip candidates already messaged (default True)
   567→        interactive: Enable interactive selector discovery on first failure
   568→
   569→    Returns:
   570→        Dict with total, sent, failed, skipped, rate_limited, details
   571→    """
   572→    config = get_config()
   573→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   574→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   575→
   576→    # Get template
   577→    try:
   578→        template = config.get_template(template_name)
   579→    except Exception:
   580→        raise ValidationError(f"Template not found: {template_name}")
   581→
   582→    # Create shared discovered selectors for interactive mode
   583→    if interactive:
   584→        from src.modules.selector_discovery import DiscoveredSelectors
   585→        discovered_selectors = DiscoveredSelectors()
   586→    else:
   587→        discovered_selectors = None
   588→
   589→    results = {
   590→        'total': len(candidates),
   591→        'sent': 0,
   592→        'failed': 0,
   593→        'skipped': 0,
   594→        'rate_limited': 0,
   595→        'details': [],
   596→    }
   597→
   598→    # Filter already-messaged candidates
   599→    send_list = []
   600→    if skip_messaged:
   601→        # Batch pre-fetch all sent message IDs to avoid N+1 queries
   602→        all_ids = [c['maimai_id'] for c in candidates]
   603→        messaged_ids = set()
   604→        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   605→            rows = session.query(Message.candidate_maimai_id).filter(
   606→                Message.candidate_maimai_id.in_(all_ids),
   607→                Message.status == 'sent'
   608→            ).distinct().all()
   609→            messaged_ids = {row[0] for row in rows}
   610→
   611→        for c in candidates:
   612→            if c['maimai_id'] in messaged_ids:
   613→                results['skipped'] += 1
   614→                results['details'].append({
   615→                    'maimai_id': c['maimai_id'],
   616→                    'name': c['name'],
   617→                    'status': 'skipped',
   618→                    'reason': 'already messaged',
   619→                })
   620→            else:
   621→                send_list.append(c)
   622→    else:
   623→        send_list = list(candidates)
   624→
   625→    if not send_list:
   626→        console.print("[yellow]No candidates to send messages to.[/yellow]")
   627→        return results
   628→
   629→    # Build preview for first candidate
   630→    first = send_list[0]
   631→    first_vars = {**common_variables, 'name': first['name'], 'company': first['company'], 'position': first['title']}
   632→    first_content = render_template(template['content'], first_vars)
   633→
   634→    # Display summary panel
   635→    summary_text = Text()
   636→    summary_text.append("Template: ", style="bold")
   637→    summary_text.append(f"{template_name}\n")
   638→    summary_text.append("Candidates: ", style="bold")
   639→    summary_text.append(f"{len(candidates)} found, {results['skipped']} already messaged\n")
   640→    summary_text.append("Will send to: ", style="bold")
   641→    summary_text.append(f"{len(send_list)} candidates\n\n")
   642→    summary_text.append("Message Preview ", style="bold cyan")
   643→    summary_text.append(f"(first candidate):\n", style="dim")
   644→    summary_text.append("To: ", style="bold cyan")
   645→    recipient = first['name']
   646→    if first.get('title') and first.get('company'):
   647→        recipient += f" ({first['title']} @ {first['company']})"
   648→    summary_text.append(f"{recipient}\n\n")
   649→    summary_text.append(first_content)
   650→
   651→    console.print(Panel(
   652→        summary_text,
   653→        title="Pipeline Summary",
   654→        border_style="green",
   655→        padding=(1, 2)
   656→    ))
   657→
   658→    # Single confirmation (run in executor to avoid nested event loop)
   659→    loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
   660→    confirm = await loop.run_in_executor(
   661→        None,
   662→        lambda: questionary.confirm(
   663→            f"Confirm batch send to {len(send_list)} candidates?"
   664→        ).unsafe_ask()
   665→    )
   666→
   667→    if not confirm:
   668→        console.print("[yellow]Batch send cancelled.[/yellow]")
   669→        return results
   670→
   671→    # Send messages one by one
   672→    from rich.progress import Progress, BarColumn, TextColumn as ProgressTextColumn, MofNCompleteColumn
   673→
   674→    with Progress(
   675→        ProgressTextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
   676→        BarColumn(),
   677→        MofNCompleteColumn(),
   678→        console=console
   679→    ) as progress:
   680→        task = progress.add_task("Sending messages...", total=len(send_list))
   681→
   682→        max_retries = 2
   683→        rate_limit_hit = False
   684→
   685→        for c in send_list:
   686→            if rate_limit_hit:
   687→                break
   688→
   689→            # Check rate limit (waits through min-interval)
   690→            try:
   691→                await async_check_rate_limit('send_message')
   692→            except RateLimitExceededError as e:
   693→                console.print(f"\n[yellow]Rate limit reached: {e}[/yellow]")
   694→                remaining = len(send_list) - (results['sent'] + results['failed'])
   695→                results['rate_limited'] = remaining
   696→                results['details'].append({
   697→                    'maimai_id': c['maimai_id'],
   698→                    'name': c['name'],
   699→                    'status': 'rate_limited',
   700→                    'reason': str(e),
   701→                })
   702→                break
   703→
   704→            # Build per-candidate variables
   705→            variables = {
   706→                **common_variables,
   707→                'name': c['name'],
   708→                'company': c['company'],
   709→                'position': c['title'],
   710→            }
   711→            content = render_template(template['content'], variables)
   712→
   713→            # Retry loop for transient failures
   714→            sent = False
   715→            last_error = None
   716→            per_candidate_timeout = 90  # seconds per candidate
   717→            for attempt in range(1 + max_retries):
   718→                try:
   719→                    success = await asyncio.wait_for(
   720→                        send_message(
   721→                            maimai_id=c['maimai_id'],
   722→                            template_name=template_name,
   723→                            variables=variables,
   724→                            browser=browser,
   725→                            skip_confirmation=True,
   726→                            interactive=interactive,
   727→                            discovered_selectors=discovered_selectors,
   728→                            _skip_rate_check=True,
   729→                            profile_url=c.get('profile_url'),
   730→                        ),
   731→                        timeout=per_candidate_timeout,
   732→                    )
   733→
   734→                    if success:
   735→                        results['sent'] += 1
   736→                        results['details'].append({
   737→                            'maimai_id': c['maimai_id'],
   738→                            'name': c['name'],
   739→                            'status': 'sent',
   740→                            'attempts': attempt + 1,
   741→                        })
   742→                        sent = True
   743→                        break
   744→                    else:
   745→                        last_error = "send returned False"
   746→
   747→                except asyncio.TimeoutError:
   748→                    last_error = f"Timed out after {per_candidate_timeout}s"
   749→                    console.print(f"[yellow]Timeout for {c['name']} ({c['maimai_id']}), skipping.[/yellow]")
   750→                    break
   751→                except PermanentFailureError as e:
   752→                    last_error = str(e)
   753→                    console.print(f"[yellow]{e}. Skipping.[/yellow]")
   754→                    break
   755→                except RateLimitExceededError as e:
   756→                    remaining = len(send_list) - (results['sent'] + results['failed'])
   757→                    results['rate_limited'] = remaining
   758→                    results['details'].append({
   759→                        'maimai_id': c['maimai_id'],
   760→                        'name': c['name'],
   761→                        'status': 'rate_limited',
   762→                        'reason': str(e),
   763→                    })
   764→                    console.print(f"\n[yellow]Rate limit reached: {e}[/yellow]")
   765→                    rate_limit_hit = True
   766→                    break
   767→                except Exception as e:
   768→                    last_error = str(e)
   769→
   770→                # Retry with exponential backoff if not last attempt
   771→                if attempt < max_retries and not rate_limit_hit:
   772→                    from src.utils.delays import get_retry_delay
   773→                    delay = get_retry_delay(attempt, base_delay=3.0, max_delay=30.0)
   774→                    logger.info(f"Retry {attempt + 1}/{max_retries} for {c['name']} in {delay:.1f}s")
   775→                    await asyncio.sleep(delay)
   776→
   777→            if not sent and not rate_limit_hit:
   778→                actual_attempts = attempt + 1
   779→                results['failed'] += 1
   780→                results['details'].append({
   781→                    'maimai_id': c['maimai_id'],
   782→                    'name': c['name'],
   783→                    'status': 'failed',
   784→                    'reason': last_error,
   785→                    'attempts': actual_attempts,
   786→                })
   787→                logger.error(f"Failed to send message to {c['name']} after {actual_attempts} attempt(s): {last_error}")
   788→
   789→            progress.advance(task)
   790→
   791→            # Human-like delay between messages
   792→            await async_random_delay('message')
   793→
   794→    return results
   795→
   796→
   797→def render_template(template_content: str, variables: Dict[str, str]) -> str:
   798→    """
   799→    Render template with variables.
   800→
   801→    Maimai chat is plain text, so values are substituted as-is without
   802→    HTML escaping (which would produce visible & entities in chat).
   803→
   804→    Args:
   805→        template_content: Template string with {variable} placeholders
   806→        variables: Variable values to substitute
   807→
   808→    Returns:
   809→        Rendered message content
   810→    """
   811→    content = template_content
   812→    for key, value in variables.items():
   813→        content = content.replace(f"{{{key}}}", str(value))
   814→    return content
   815→

   825→    Args:

   829→
   830→    Returns:

   836→
   837→    # Display preview

   840→    return content

   882→async def interactive_confirm(
   883→    content: str,
   884→    candidate_info: Optional[Dict] = None,
   885→    template_name: Optional[str] = None
   886→) -> str:
   887→    """
   888→    Show interactive confirmation dialog.
   889→
   890→    Args:
   891→        content: Message content to confirm
   892→        candidate_info: Optional candidate info
   893→        template_name: Optional template name
   894→
   895→    Returns:
   896→        Action string: 'send', 'edit', or 'skip'
   897→    """
   898→    # Display preview
   899→    display_message_preview(content, candidate_info, template_name)
   900→
   901→    console.print()
   902→
   903→    # Interactive prompt
   904→    choices = [
   905→        questionary.Choice("Send message", value="send"),
   906→        questionary.Choice("Edit content", value="edit"),
   907→        questionary.Choice("Skip (don't send)", value="skip"),
   908→    ]
   909→
   910→    loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
   911→    action = await loop.run_in_executor(
   912→        None,
   913→        lambda: questionary.select(
   914→            "What would you like to do?",
   915→            choices=choices,
   916→            style=questionary.Style([
   917→                ('selected', 'fg:green bold'),
   918→                ('pointer', 'fg:green bold'),
   919→                ('highlighted', 'fg:green'),
   920→            ])
   921→        ).unsafe_ask()
   922→    )
   923→
   924→    return action or 'skip'

   927→async def edit_message(content: str) -> Optional[str]:
   928→    """
   929→    Allow user to edit message content.
   930→
   931→    Args:
   932→        content: Original content
   933→
   934→    Returns:
   935→        Edited content or None if cancelled
   936→    """
   937→    console.print("\n[dim]Enter new message content (Ctrl+D to finish, Ctrl+C to cancel):[/dim]")
   938→
   939→    try:
   940→        loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
   941→        edited = await loop.run_in_executor(
   942→            None,
   943→            lambda: questionary.text(
   944→                "Message:",
   945→                default=content,
   946→                multiline=True
   947→            ).unsafe_ask()
   948→        )
   949→
   950→        return edited
   951→    except KeyboardInterrupt:
   952→        return None

   955→async def _find_element_by_selectors(page: Page, selectors: List[str], timeout: int = 3000):
   956→    """Try multiple selectors and return the first matching element.
   957→
   958→    Args:
   959→        page: Playwright page instance
   960→        selectors: List of CSS selectors to try in order
   961→        timeout: Timeout per selector in ms
   962→
   963→    Returns:
   964→        Tuple of (element, selector) or (None, None) if not found
   965→    """
   966→    for selector in selectors:
   967→        try:
   968→            elem = await page.wait_for_selector(selector, timeout=timeout)
   969→            if elem:
   970→                return elem, selector
   971→        except Exception:
   972→            continue
   973→    return None, None
   974→

   976→async def _click_chat_button(page: Page, config) -> bool:
   977→    """Find and click chat/message button, then wait for navigation to chat page."""
   978→    selectors = [
   979→        config.get_selector('message.chat_button'),
   980→        'button[class*="chat"]',
   981→        '[class*="message-btn"]',
   982→        'button:has-text("极速联系")',
   983→        'button:has-text("立即沟通")',
   984→        'button:has-text("发消息")',
   985→        'button:has-text("私信")',
   986→        'button:has-text("聊天")',
   987→    ]
   988→
   989→    url_before = page.url
   990→
   991→    for selector in selectors:
   992→        try:
   993→            button = await page.wait_for_selector(selector, timeout=3000)
   994→            if button:
   995→                await human_click(page, selector)
   996→                logger.debug(f"Clicked chat button: {selector}")
   997→
   998→                # Wait for navigation or page change after clicking
   999→                try:
  1000→                    # Wait for URL change (chat page transition) or new content load
  1001→                    await page.wait_for_url(
  1002→                        lambda url: url != url_before,
  1003→                        timeout=8000,
  1004→                    )
  1005→                    logger.debug(f"Page navigated to: {page.url}")
  1006→                except Exception:
  1007→                    # URL may not change if chat opens as overlay/modal
  1008→                    logger.debug("URL did not change after chat button click, checking for chat panel")
  1009→
  1010→                # Wait for chat-related elements to appear (input or conversation area)
  1011→                chat_ready_selectors = [
  1012→                    'textarea', '[contenteditable="true"]',
  1013→                    '[class*="chat-container"]', '[class*="chat-content"]',
  1014→                    '[class*="message-list"]', '[class*="im-message"]',
  1015→                ]
  1016→                for chat_sel in chat_ready_selectors:
  1017→                    try:
  1018→                        await page.wait_for_selector(chat_sel, timeout=5000)
  1019→                        logger.debug(f"Chat page ready, found: {chat_sel}")
  1020→                        return True
  1021→                    except Exception:
  1022→                        continue
  1023→
  1024→                # If we got here, button was clicked but no chat UI detected
  1025→                # Still return True since the button was found and clicked
  1026→                logger.warning("Chat button clicked but chat UI not detected")
  1027→                return True
  1028→        except Exception:
  1029→            continue
  1030→
  1031→    logger.warning("Chat button not found")
  1032→    return False
  1033→
  1034→
  1035→async def _type_message(page: Page, config, content: str) -> bool:
  1036→    """Find message input and type content.
  1037→
  1038→    Uses progressively broader selectors. Broad selectors (bare textarea,
  1039→    contenteditable) are only tried when the current URL looks like a chat page
  1040→    to avoid typing into unrelated inputs (e.g. search bars on profile pages).
  1041→    """
  1042→    # Chat-specific selectors (always safe to try)
  1043→    chat_selectors = [
  1044→        config.get_selector('message.message_input'),
  1045→        'textarea[class*="chat"]',
  1046→        'textarea[class*="message"]',
  1047→        'textarea[class*="im-"]',
  1048→        '[class*="chat"] [contenteditable="true"]',
  1049→        '[class*="im-"] [contenteditable="true"]',
  1050→        '[class*="message"] [contenteditable="true"]',
  1051→    ]
  1052→
  1053→    for selector in chat_selectors:
  1054→        try:
  1055→            input_elem = await page.wait_for_selector(selector, timeout=3000)
  1056→            if input_elem:
  1057→                await human_type(page, selector, content)
  1058→                logger.debug(f"Typed message in: {selector}")
  1059→                return True
  1060→        except Exception as e:
  1061→            logger.debug(f"Chat selector '{selector}' failed: {e}")
  1062→            continue
  1063→
  1064→    # Broad selectors — only try if URL suggests we're on a chat page
  1065→    current_url = page.url
  1066→    is_chat_page = any(kw in current_url for kw in ('chat', 'im/', 'uh_chat', 'message'))
  1067→
  1068→    if is_chat_page:
  1069→        broad_selectors = [
  1070→            '[contenteditable="true"]',
  1071→            'textarea',
  1072→        ]
  1073→        for selector in broad_selectors:
  1074→            try:
  1075→                input_elem = await page.wait_for_selector(selector, timeout=3000)
  1076→                if input_elem:
  1077→                    await human_type(page, selector, content)
  1078→                    logger.debug(f"Typed message in (broad, chat URL): {selector}")
  1079→                    return True
  1080→            except Exception as e:
  1081→                logger.debug(f"Broad selector '{selector}' failed: {e}")
  1082→                continue
  1083→
  1084→    logger.warning(f"Message input not found (is_chat_page={is_chat_page}, url={current_url})")
  1085→    return False
  1086→
  1087→
  1088→async def _click_send_button(page: Page, config) -> bool:
  1089→    """Find and click send button."""
  1090→    selectors = [
  1091→        config.get_selector('message.send_button'),
  1092→        'button[class*="send"]',
  1093→        'button:has-text("提交")',
  1094→        'button:has-text("发送")',
  1095→        'button:has-text("Send")',
  1096→        '[class*="send-btn"]',
  1097→    ]
  1098→
  1099→    button, selector = await _find_element_by_selectors(page, selectors)
  1100→    if button:
  1101→        await human_click(page, selector)
  1102→        logger.debug(f"Clicked send button: {selector}")
  1103→        await async_random_delay('action')
  1104→        return True
  1105→
  1106→    logger.warning("Send button not found")
  1107→    return False
